@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class ChatService {

    private final ConversationMapper conversationMapper;
    private final MessageMapper messageMapper;
    private final LlmProviderFactory llmProviderFactory;
    private final KnowledgeRetrievalService knowledgeRetrievalService;
    private final ChatCacheService chatCacheService;

    private static final String SYSTEM_PROMPT = """
            You are an intelligent coding assistant. You help developers with programming questions, \
            code reviews, debugging, and learning new technologies. \
            When answering questions, use the provided knowledge context if available. \
            Be concise, accurate, and provide code examples when appropriate. \
            If you're unsure about something, say so rather than guessing.""";

    @Transactional
    public Flux<String> sendMessage(Long userId, ChatSendRequest request) {
        // Create or get conversation
        Conversation conversation;
        if (request.getConversationId() == null) {
            conversation = Conversation.builder()
                    .userId(userId)
                    .title(generateTitle(request.getContent()))
                    .createdAt(LocalDateTime.now())
                    .updatedAt(LocalDateTime.now())
                    .build();
            conversationMapper.insert(conversation);
        } else {
            conversation = conversationMapper.selectById(request.getConversationId());
            if (conversation == null || !conversation.getUserId().equals(userId)) {
                throw new BusinessException(404, "Conversation not found");
            }
            conversation.setUpdatedAt(LocalDateTime.now());
            conversationMapper.updateById(conversation);
        }

        // Save user message
        Message userMessage = Message.builder()
                .conversationId(conversation.getId())
                .role("user")
                .content(request.getContent())
                .createdAt(LocalDateTime.now())
                .build();
        messageMapper.insert(userMessage);

        Long conversationId = conversation.getId();
        String questionHash = createQuestionHash(request.getContent());

        // 1) 热点问答缓存：命中直接返回
        Optional<ChatCacheService.QaCacheEntry> cachedAnswer = chatCacheService.getCachedAnswer(questionHash);
        if (cachedAnswer.isPresent()) {
            ChatCacheService.QaCacheEntry cacheEntry = cachedAnswer.get();
            Message assistantMessage = Message.builder()
                    .conversationId(conversationId)
                    .role("assistant")
                    .content(cacheEntry.getAnswer())
                    .sources(cacheEntry.getSourcesJson())
                    .createdAt(LocalDateTime.now())
                    .build();
            messageMapper.insert(assistantMessage);

            updateConversationContextCache(conversationId, request.getContent(), cacheEntry.getAnswer());
            log.info("QA_CACHE_HIT questionHash={} conversationId={}", questionHash, conversationId);
            return Flux.just(cacheEntry.getAnswer());
        }
        log.info("QA_CACHE_MISS questionHash={} conversationId={}", questionHash, conversationId);

        // 2) 知识召回（仅在未命中缓存时执行）
        List<KnowledgeNodeVO> knowledgeNodes = knowledgeRetrievalService.retrieve(request.getContent());
        String knowledgeContext = knowledgeRetrievalService.buildContext(knowledgeNodes);

        // 3) 会话上下文缓存：命中 Redis，否则回退 DB
        List<ChatMessage> chatMessages;
        Optional<List<ChatMessage>> cachedContext = chatCacheService.getConversationContext(conversationId);
        if (cachedContext.isPresent() && !cachedContext.get().isEmpty()) {
            chatMessages = new ArrayList<>(cachedContext.get());
            chatMessages.add(ChatMessage.user(request.getContent()));
            log.info("CTX_CACHE_HIT conversationId={}", conversationId);
        } else {
            List<Message> history = messageMapper.selectByConversationIdOrderByCreatedAt(conversationId);
            chatMessages = history.stream()
                    .map(m -> new ChatMessage(m.getRole(), m.getContent()))
                    .collect(Collectors.toCollection(ArrayList::new));
            log.info("CTX_CACHE_MISS conversationId={}, fallback=db", conversationId);
        }

        // Build system prompt with knowledge context
        String systemPrompt = SYSTEM_PROMPT;
        if (!knowledgeContext.isEmpty()) {
            systemPrompt = systemPrompt + "\n\n" + knowledgeContext;
        }

        // Stream LLM response
        StringBuilder responseBuilder = new StringBuilder();

        return llmProviderFactory.getProvider()
                .chatStream(chatMessages, systemPrompt)
                .doOnNext(responseBuilder::append)
                .doOnComplete(() -> {
                    String sourcesJson = knowledgeNodes.isEmpty() ? null :
                            knowledgeNodes.stream()
                                    .map(n -> "\"" + n.getId() + "\"")
                                    .collect(Collectors.joining(",", "[", "]"));

                    String answer = responseBuilder.toString();

                    Message assistantMessage = Message.builder()
                            .conversationId(conversationId)
                            .role("assistant")
                            .content(answer)
                            .sources(sourcesJson)
                            .createdAt(LocalDateTime.now())
                            .build();
                    messageMapper.insert(assistantMessage);

                    // 写入 Redis（热点问答 + 会话上下文）
                    chatCacheService.cacheAnswer(questionHash, answer, sourcesJson);
                    updateConversationContextCache(conversationId, request.getContent(), answer);

                    log.debug("Assistant message saved for conversation {}", conversationId);
                })
                .doOnError(e -> log.error("Error during chat stream: {}", e.getMessage()));
    }

    public List<ConversationVO> getConversations(Long userId) {
        List<Conversation> conversations = conversationMapper.selectByUserIdOrderByUpdatedAtDesc(userId);
        return conversations.stream()
                .map(this::toConversationVO)
                .collect(Collectors.toList());
    }

    public List<MessageVO> getMessages(Long userId, Long conversationId) {
        Conversation conversation = conversationMapper.selectById(conversationId);
        if (conversation == null || !conversation.getUserId().equals(userId)) {
            throw new BusinessException(404, "Conversation not found");
        }

        List<Message> messages = messageMapper.selectByConversationIdOrderByCreatedAt(conversationId);
        return messages.stream()
                .map(this::toMessageVO)
                .collect(Collectors.toList());
    }

    @Transactional
    public void deleteConversation(Long userId, Long conversationId) {
        Conversation conversation = conversationMapper.selectById(conversationId);
        if (conversation == null || !conversation.getUserId().equals(userId)) {
            throw new BusinessException(404, "Conversation not found");
        }

        messageMapper.deleteByConversationId(conversationId);
        conversationMapper.deleteById(conversationId);
        log.info("Conversation {} deleted by user {}", conversationId, userId);
    }

    /**
     * 生成学习路径（非流式调用）
     */
    public String generateLearningPath(String prompt) {
        try {
            log.info("Calling AI to generate learning path with prompt: {}", prompt);

            List<ChatMessage> messages = new ArrayList<>();
            messages.add(new ChatMessage("user", prompt));

            String response = llmProviderFactory.getProvider().chat(messages, SYSTEM_PROMPT);

            log.info("AI response for learning path received, length: {}", response != null ? response.length() : 0);
            return response;

        } catch (Exception e) {
            log.error("Failed to generate learning path: {}", e.getMessage(), e);
            return null;
        }
    }

    private String generateTitle(String content) {
        if (content.length() <= 50) {
            return content;
        }
        return content.substring(0, 47) + "...";
    }

    private String createQuestionHash(String content) {
        String normalized = content == null ? "" : content.trim().toLowerCase();
        return DigestUtils.md5DigestAsHex(normalized.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8));
    }

    private void updateConversationContextCache(Long conversationId, String question, String answer) {
        List<ChatMessage> context = chatCacheService.getConversationContext(conversationId)
                .map(ArrayList::new)
                .orElseGet(ArrayList::new);

        context.add(ChatMessage.user(question));
        context.add(ChatMessage.assistant(answer));

        int maxMessages = 20;
        if (context.size() > maxMessages) {
            context = new ArrayList<>(context.subList(context.size() - maxMessages, context.size()));
        }

        chatCacheService.saveConversationContext(conversationId, context);
    }

    private ConversationVO toConversationVO(Conversation conversation) {
        return ConversationVO.builder()
                .id(conversation.getId())
                .title(conversation.getTitle())
                .createdAt(conversation.getCreatedAt())
                .updatedAt(conversation.getUpdatedAt())
                .build();
    }

    private MessageVO toMessageVO(Message message) {
        return MessageVO.builder()
                .id(message.getId())
                .conversationId(message.getConversationId())
                .role(message.getRole())
                .content(message.getContent())
                .sources(message.getSources())
                .createdAt(message.getCreatedAt())
                .build();
    }
}
```

## 3. src/main/resources/schema.sql

(Complete file - 369 lines total, showing all content as requested)

```sql
CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS coding_assistant DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

USE coding_assistant;

-- User table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `user` (
    `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    `username` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    `password` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    `email` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    `avatar` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,
    `level` VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'beginner',
    `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    `updated_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    INDEX `idx_user_username` (`username`),
    INDEX `idx_user_email` (`email`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Conversation table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `conversation` (
    `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    `user_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
    `title` VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL,
    `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    `updated_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    INDEX `idx_conversation_user_id` (`user_id`),
    CONSTRAINT `fk_conversation_user` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `user` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Message table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `message` (
    `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    `conversation_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
    `role` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    `content` TEXT NOT NULL,
    `sources` JSON DEFAULT NULL,
    `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    INDEX `idx_message_conversation_id` (`conversation_id`),
    CONSTRAINT `fk_message_conversation` FOREIGN KEY (`conversation_id`) REFERENCES `conversation` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Feedback table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `feedback` (
    `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    `message_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
    `user_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
    `rating` VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
    `comment` TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
    `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    UNIQUE KEY `uk_feedback_message_user` (`message_id`, `user_id`),
    CONSTRAINT `fk_feedback_message` FOREIGN KEY (`message_id`) REFERENCES `message` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    CONSTRAINT `fk_feedback_user` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `user` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Code snippet table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `code_snippet` (
    `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    `user_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
    `title` VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
    `code` TEXT NOT NULL,
    `language` VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL,
    `description` TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
    `tags` JSON DEFAULT NULL,
    `use_count` INT DEFAULT 0,
    `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    `updated_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    INDEX `idx_snippet_user_id` (`user_id`),
    CONSTRAINT `fk_snippet_user` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `user` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Learning path table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `learning_path` (
    `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    `user_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
    `target` VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
    `status` VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'active',
    `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    `updated_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    INDEX `idx_path_user_id` (`user_id`),
    CONSTRAINT `fk_path_user` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `user` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Learning node table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `learning_node` (
    `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    `path_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
    `knowledge_id` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    `node_order` INT NOT NULL,
    `status` VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'todo',
    `resource_urls` JSON DEFAULT NULL,
    INDEX `idx_node_path_id` (`path_id`),
    CONSTRAINT `fk_node_path` FOREIGN KEY (`path_id`) REFERENCES `learning_path` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Learning record table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `learning_record` (
    `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    `user_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
    `action_type` VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL,
    `target_id` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
    `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    INDEX `idx_record_user_created` (`user_id`, `created_at`),
    CONSTRAINT `fk_record_user` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `user` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- 会话1: Spring Boot 整合 Redis
INSERT INTO `message` (`id`, `conversation_id`, `role`, `content`, `sources`, `created_at`) VALUES
(1,  1, 'user',      'Spring Boot 如何整合 Redis？', NULL, '2026-03-10 09:00:00'),
(2,  1, 'assistant', '## Spring Boot 整合 Redis\n\nSpring Boot 整合 Redis 非常简单，主要分以下几步：\n\n### 1. 添加依赖\n\n```xml\n<dependency>\n    <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>\n    <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-redis</artifactId>\n</dependency>\n```\n\n### 2. 配置连接信息\n\n```yaml\nspring:\n  redis:\n    host: localhost\n    port: 6379\n    password: your-password\n    database: 0\n```\n\n### 3. 使用 RedisTemplate\n\n```java\n@Autowired\nprivate RedisTemplate<String, Object> redisTemplate;\n\npublic void setValue(String key, Object value) {\n    redisTemplate.opsForValue().set(key, value);\n}\n\npublic Object getValue(String key) {\n    return redisTemplate.opsForValue().get(key);\n}\n```\n\n### 原理说明\n\nSpring Boot 通过 `spring-boot-starter-data-redis` 自动配置了 `RedisConnectionFactory` 和 `RedisTemplate`，底层使用 Lettuce 作为 Redis 客户端。', '["redis", "spring-boot"]', '2026-03-10 09:00:30'),
(3,  1, 'user',      '如何配置 Redis 序列化方式？', NULL, '2026-03-10 09:05:00'),
(4,  1, 'assistant', '## Redis 序列化配置\n\n默认的 `RedisTemplate` 使用 JDK 序列化，建议替换为 JSON 序列化：\n\n```java\n@Configuration\npublic class RedisConfig {\n\n    @Bean\n    public RedisTemplate<String, Object> redisTemplate(RedisConnectionFactory factory) {\n        RedisTemplate<String, Object> template = new RedisTemplate<>();\n        template.setConnectionFactory(factory);\n        \n        // Key 使用 String 序列化\n        template.setKeySerializer(new StringRedisSerializer());\n        template.setHashKeySerializer(new StringRedisSerializer());\n        \n        // Value 使用 JSON 序列化\n        Jackson2JsonRedisSerializer<Object> jsonSerializer = \n            new Jackson2JsonRedisSerializer<>(Object.class);\n        template.setValueSerializer(jsonSerializer);\n        template.setHashValueSerializer(jsonSerializer);\n        \n        template.afterPropertiesSet();\n        return template;\n    }\n}\n```\n\n这样存储的数据在 Redis 中可读性更好，也便于其他语言读取。', '["redis", "spring-boot"]', '2026-03-10 09:05:30');

-- 会话2: MyBatis-Plus 分页查询
INSERT INTO `message` (`id`, `conversation_id`, `role`, `content`, `sources`, `created_at`) VALUES
(5,  2, 'user',      'MyBatis-Plus 怎么实现分页查询？', NULL, '2026-03-12 14:00:00'),
(6,  2, 'assistant', '## MyBatis-Plus 分页查询\n\n### 1. 配置分页插件\n\n```java\n@Configuration\npublic class MyBatisPlusConfig {\n    @Bean\n    public MybatisPlusInterceptor mybatisPlusInterceptor() {\n        MybatisPlusInterceptor interceptor = new MybatisPlusInterceptor();\n        interceptor.addInnerInterceptor(new PaginationInnerInterceptor(DbType.MYSQL));\n        return interceptor;\n    }\n}\n```\n\n### 2. 使用分页\n\n```java\n// Service 层\npublic IPage<User> getUserPage(int current, int size) {\n    Page<User> page = new Page<>(current, size);\n    return userMapper.selectPage(page, null);\n}\n\n// 带条件的分页查询\npublic IPage<User> searchUsers(int current, int size, String keyword) {\n    Page<User> page = new Page<>(current, size);\n    LambdaQueryWrapper<User> wrapper = new LambdaQueryWrapper<>();\n    wrapper.like(User::getUsername, keyword);\n    return userMapper.selectPage(page, wrapper);\n}\n```\n\n### 原理\n\nMyBatis-Plus 的分页插件会拦截 SQL，自动添加 `LIMIT` 语句，并执行 `COUNT` 查询获取总记录数。', '["mybatis-plus", "mysql"]', '2026-03-12 14:00:45'),
(7,  2, 'user',      '如何自定义分页 SQL？', NULL, '2026-03-12 14:10:00'),
(8,  2, 'assistant', '## 自定义分页 SQL\n\n在 Mapper 接口中定义方法，第一个参数为 `IPage`：\n\n```java\n// Mapper 接口\n@Mapper\npublic interface UserMapper extends BaseMapper<User> {\n    IPage<UserVO> selectUserPage(IPage<UserVO> page, @Param(\"keyword\") String keyword);\n}\n```\n\n```xml\n<!-- UserMapper.xml -->\n<select id=\"selectUserPage\" resultType=\"com.example.vo.UserVO\">\n    SELECT u.id, u.username, u.email, COUNT(c.id) as chat_count\n    FROM user u\n    LEFT JOIN conversation c ON u.id = c.user_id\n    WHERE u.username LIKE CONCAT(\'%\', #{keyword}, \'%\')\n    GROUP BY u.id\n</select>\n```\n\nMyBatis-Plus 会自动为自定义 SQL 添加分页支持。', '["mybatis-plus"]', '2026-03-12 14:10:30');

-- 会话3: Vue3 Composition API
INSERT INTO `message` (`id`, `conversation_id`, `role`, `content`, `sources`, `created_at`) VALUES
(9,  3, 'user',      'Vue3 的 Composition API 怎么用？和 Options API 有什么区别？', NULL, '2026-03-15 10:00:00'),
(10, 3, 'assistant', '## Vue 3 Composition API\n\n### 基本用法\n\n```vue\n<script setup lang=\"ts\">\nimport { ref, computed, onMounted } from \"vue\"\n\n// 响应式状态\nconst count = ref(0)\nconst doubleCount = computed(() => count.value * 2)\n\n// 方法\nfunction increment() {\n  count.value++\n}\n\n// 生命周期\nonMounted(() => {\n  console.log(\"组件已挂载\")\n})\n</script>\n\n<template>\n  <button @click=\"increment\">{{ count }} x 2 = {{ doubleCount }}</button>\n</template>\n```\n\n### 与 Options API 的区别\n\n| 特性 | Options API | Composition API |\n|------|------------|----------------|\n| 代码组织 | 按选项类型分组 | 按逻辑功能分组 |\n| 逻辑复用 | Mixins（有命名冲突） | Composables（清晰明确） |\n| TypeScript | 支持较弱 | 完美支持 |\n| 代码量 | 较多模板代码 | 更简洁 |\n\nComposition API 最大的优势在于**逻辑关注点的聚合**，相关代码放在一起，项目越大优势越明显。', '["vue3", "javascript"]', '2026-03-15 10:01:00');

 `./\backend\src\main\java\com\coding\assistant\service\ChatService.java`

1	package com.coding.assistant.service;
2	
3	import com.coding.assistant.ai.ChatMessage;
4	import com.coding.assistant.ai.LlmProviderFactory;
5	import com.coding.assistant.dto.ConversationVO;
6	import com.coding.assistant.dto.KnowledgeNodeVO;
7	import com.coding.assistant.dto.MessageVO;
8	import com.coding.assistant.dto.ChatSendRequest;
9	import com.coding.assistant.entity.Conversation;
10	import com.coding.assistant.entity.Message;
11	import com.coding.assistant.exception.BusinessException;
12	import com.coding.assistant.mapper.ConversationMapper;
13	import com.coding.assistant.mapper.MessageMapper;
14	import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
15	import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
16	import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
17	import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;
18	import org.springframework.util.DigestUtils;
19	import reactor.core.publisher.Flux;
20	
21	import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;
22	import java.time.LocalDateTime;
23	import java.util.ArrayList;
24	import java.util.List;
25	import java.util.Optional;
26	import java.util.stream.Collectors;
27	
28	@Slf4j
29	@Service
30	@RequiredArgsConstructor
31	public class ChatService {
32	
33	    private final ConversationMapper conversationMapper;
34	    private final MessageMapper messageMapper;
35	    private final LlmProviderFactory llmProviderFactory;
36	    private final KnowledgeRetrievalService knowledgeRetrievalService;
37	    private final ChatCacheService chatCacheService;
38	
39	    private static final String SYSTEM_PROMPT = """
40	            You are an intelligent coding assistant. You help developers with programming questions, \
41	            code reviews, debugging, and learning new technologies. \
42	            When answering questions, use the provided knowledge context if available. \
43	            Be concise, accurate, and provide code examples when appropriate. \
44	            If you're unsure about something, say so rather than guessing.""";
45	
46	    @Transactional
47	    public Flux<String> sendMessage(Long userId, ChatSendRequest request) {
48	        // Create or get conversation
49	        Conversation conversation;
50	        if (request.getConversationId() == null) {
51	            conversation = Conversation.builder()
52	                    .userId(userId)
53	                    .title(generateTitle(request.getContent()))
54	                    .createdAt(LocalDateTime.now())
55	                    .updatedAt(LocalDateTime.now())
56	                    .build();
57	            conversationMapper.insert(conversation);
58	        } else {
59	            conversation = conversationMapper.selectById(request.getConversationId());
60	            if (conversation == null || !conversation.getUserId().equals(userId)) {
61	                throw new BusinessException(404, "Conversation not found");
62	            }
63	            conversation.setUpdatedAt(LocalDateTime.now());
64	            conversationMapper.updateById(conversation);
65	        }
66	
67	        // Save user message
68	        Message userMessage = Message.builder()
69	                .conversationId(conversation.getId())
70	                .role("user")
71	                .content(request.getContent())
72	                .createdAt(LocalDateTime.now())
73	                .build();
74	        messageMapper.insert(userMessage);
75	
76	        Long conversationId = conversation.getId();
77	        String questionHash = createQuestionHash(request.getContent());
78	
79	        // 1) 热点问答缓存：命中直接返回
80	        Optional<ChatCacheService.QaCacheEntry> cachedAnswer = chatCacheService.getCachedAnswer(questionHash);
81	        if (cachedAnswer.isPresent()) {
82	            ChatCacheService.QaCacheEntry cacheEntry = cachedAnswer.get();
83	            Message assistantMessage = Message.builder()
84	                    .conversationId(conversationId)
85	                    .role("assistant")
86	                    .content(cacheEntry.getAnswer())
87	                    .sources(cacheEntry.getSourcesJson())
88	                    .createdAt(LocalDateTime.now())
89	                    .build();
90	            messageMapper.insert(assistantMessage);
91	
92	            updateConversationContextCache(conversationId, request.getContent(), cacheEntry.getAnswer());
93	            log.info("QA_CACHE_HIT questionHash={} conversationId={}", questionHash, conversationId);
94	            return Flux.just(cacheEntry.getAnswer());
95	        }
96	        log.info("QA_CACHE_MISS questionHash={} conversationId={}", questionHash, conversationId);
97	
98	        // 2) 知识召回（仅在未命中缓存时执行）
99	        List<KnowledgeNodeVO> knowledgeNodes = knowledgeRetrievalService.retrieve(request.getContent());
100	        String knowledgeContext = knowledgeRetrievalService.buildContext(knowledgeNodes);
101	
102	        // 3) 会话上下文缓存：命中 Redis，否则回退 DB
103	        List<ChatMessage> chatMessages;
104	        Optional<List<ChatMessage>> cachedContext = chatCacheService.getConversationContext(conversationId);
105	        if (cachedContext.isPresent() && !cachedContext.get().isEmpty()) {
106	            chatMessages = new ArrayList<>(cachedContext.get());
107	            chatMessages.add(ChatMessage.user(request.getContent()));
108	            log.info("CTX_CACHE_HIT conversationId={}", conversationId);
109	        } else {
110	            List<Message> history = messageMapper.selectByConversationIdOrderByCreatedAt(conversationId);
111	            chatMessages = history.stream()
112	                    .map(m -> new ChatMessage(m.getRole(), m.getContent()))
113	                    .collect(Collectors.toCollection(ArrayList::new));
114	            log.info("CTX_CACHE_MISS conversationId={}, fallback=db", conversationId);
115	        }
116	
117	        // Build system prompt with knowledge context
118	        String systemPrompt = SYSTEM_PROMPT;
119	        if (!knowledgeContext.isEmpty()) {
120	            systemPrompt = systemPrompt + "\n\n" + knowledgeContext;
121	        }
122	
123	        // Stream LLM response
124	        StringBuilder responseBuilder = new StringBuilder();
125	
126	        return llmProviderFactory.getProvider()
127	                .chatStream(chatMessages, systemPrompt)
128	                .doOnNext(responseBuilder::append)
129	                .doOnComplete(() -> {
130	                    String sourcesJson = knowledgeNodes.isEmpty() ? null :
131	                            knowledgeNodes.stream()
132	                                    .map(n -> "\"" + n.getId() + "\"")
133	                                    .collect(Collectors.joining(",", "[", "]"));
134	
135	                    String answer = responseBuilder.toString();
136	
137	                    Message assistantMessage = Message.builder()
138	                            .conversationId(conversationId)
139	                            .role("assistant")
140	                            .content(answer)
141	                            .sources(sourcesJson)
142	                            .createdAt(LocalDateTime.now())
143	                            .build();
144	                    messageMapper.insert(assistantMessage);
145	
146	                    // 写入 Redis（热点问答 + 会话上下文）
147	                    chatCacheService.cacheAnswer(questionHash, answer, sourcesJson);
148	                    updateConversationContextCache(conversationId, request.getContent(), answer);
149	
150	                    log.debug("Assistant message saved for conversation {}", conversationId);
151	                })
152	                .doOnError(e -> log.error("Error during chat stream: {}", e.getMessage()));
153	    }
154	
155	    public List<ConversationVO> getConversations(Long userId) {
156	        List<Conversation> conversations = conversationMapper.selectByUserIdOrderByUpdatedAtDesc(userId);
157	        return conversations.stream()
158	                .map(this::toConversationVO)
159	                .collect(Collectors.toList());
160	    }
161	
162	    public List<MessageVO> getMessages(Long userId, Long conversationId) {
163	        Conversation conversation = conversationMapper.selectById(conversationId);
164	        if (conversation == null || !conversation.getUserId().equals(userId)) {
165	            throw new BusinessException(404, "Conversation not found");
166	        }
167	
168	        List<Message> messages = messageMapper.selectByConversationIdOrderByCreatedAt(conversationId);
169	        return messages.stream()
170	                .map(this::toMessageVO)
171	                .collect(Collectors.toList());
172	    }
173	
174	    @Transactional
175	    public void deleteConversation(Long userId, Long conversationId) {
176	        Conversation conversation = conversationMapper.selectById(conversationId);
177	        if (conversation == null || !conversation.getUserId().equals(userId)) {
178	            throw new BusinessException(404, "Conversation not found");
179	        }
180	
181	        messageMapper.deleteByConversationId(conversationId);
182	        conversationMapper.deleteById(conversationId);
183	        log.info("Conversation {} deleted by user {}", conversationId, userId);
184	    }
185	
186	    /**
187	     * 生成学习路径（非流式调用）
188	     */
189	    public String generateLearningPath(String prompt) {
190	        try {
191	            log.info("Calling AI to generate learning path with prompt: {}", prompt);
192	
193	            List<ChatMessage> messages = new ArrayList<>();
194	            messages.add(new ChatMessage("user", prompt));
195	
196	            String response = llmProviderFactory.getProvider().chat(messages, SYSTEM_PROMPT);
197	
198	            log.info("AI response for learning path received, length: {}", response != null ? response.length() : 0);
199	            return response;
200	
201	        } catch (Exception e) {
202	            log.error("Failed to generate learning path: {}", e.getMessage(), e);
203	            return null;
204	        }
205	    }
206	
207	    private String generateTitle(String content) {
208	        if (content.length() <= 50) {
209	            return content;
210	        }
211	        return content.substring(0, 47) + "...";
212	    }
213	
214	    private String createQuestionHash(String content) {
215	        String normalized = content == null ? "" : content.trim().toLowerCase();
216	        return DigestUtils.md5DigestAsHex(normalized.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8));
217	    }
218	
219	    private void updateConversationContextCache(Long conversationId, String question, String answer) {
220	        List<ChatMessage> context = chatCacheService.getConversationContext(conversationId)
221	                .map(ArrayList::new)
222	                .orElseGet(ArrayList::new);
223	
224	        context.add(ChatMessage.user(question));
225	        context.add(ChatMessage.assistant(answer));
226	
227	        int maxMessages = 20;
228	        if (context.size() > maxMessages) {
229	            context = new ArrayList<>(context.subList(context.size() - maxMessages, context.size()));
230	        }
231	
232	        chatCacheService.saveConversationContext(conversationId, context);
233	    }
234	
235	    private ConversationVO toConversationVO(Conversation conversation) {
236	        return ConversationVO.builder()
237	                .id(conversation.getId())
238	                .title(conversation.getTitle())
239	                .createdAt(conversation.getCreatedAt())
240	                .updatedAt(conversation.getUpdatedAt())
241	                .build();
242	    }
243	
244	    private MessageVO toMessageVO(Message message) {
245	        return MessageVO.builder()
246	                .id(message.getId())
247	                .conversationId(message.getConversationId())
248	                .role(message.getRole())
249	                .content(message.getContent())
250	                .sources(message.getSources())
251	                .createdAt(message.getCreatedAt())
252	                .build();
253	    }
254	}
255

1	CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS coding_assistant DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
2	
3	USE coding_assistant;
4	
5	-- User table
6	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `user` (
7	    `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
8	    `username` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
9	    `password` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
10	    `email` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
11	    `avatar` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,
12	    `level` VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'beginner',
13	    `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
14	    `updated_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
15	    INDEX `idx_user_username` (`username`),
16	    INDEX `idx_user_email` (`email`)
17	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
18	
19	-- Conversation table
20	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `conversation` (
21	    `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
22	    `user_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
23	    `title` VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL,
24	    `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
25	    `updated_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
26	    INDEX `idx_conversation_user_id` (`user_id`),
27	    CONSTRAINT `fk_conversation_user` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `user` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
28	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
29	
30	-- Message table
31	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `message` (
32	    `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
33	    `conversation_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
34	    `role` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
35	    `content` TEXT NOT NULL,
36	    `sources` JSON DEFAULT NULL,
37	    `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
38	    INDEX `idx_message_conversation_id` (`conversation_id`),
39	    CONSTRAINT `fk_message_conversation` FOREIGN KEY (`conversation_id`) REFERENCES `conversation` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
40	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
41	
42	-- Feedback table
43	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `feedback` (
44	    `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
45	    `message_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
46	    `user_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
47	    `rating` VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
48	    `comment` TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
49	    `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
50	    UNIQUE KEY `uk_feedback_message_user` (`message_id`, `user_id`),
51	    CONSTRAINT `fk_feedback_message` FOREIGN KEY (`message_id`) REFERENCES `message` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
52	    CONSTRAINT `fk_feedback_user` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `user` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
53	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
54	
55	-- Code snippet table
56	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `code_snippet` (
57	    `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
58	    `user_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
59	    `title` VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
60	    `code` TEXT NOT NULL,
61	    `language` VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL,
62	    `description` TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
63	    `tags` JSON DEFAULT NULL,
64	    `use_count` INT DEFAULT 0,
65	    `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
66	    `updated_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
67	    INDEX `idx_snippet_user_id` (`user_id`),
68	    CONSTRAINT `fk_snippet_user` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `user` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
69	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
70	
71	-- Learning path table
72	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `learning_path` (
73	    `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
74	    `user_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
75	    `target` VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
76	    `status` VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'active',
77	    `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
78	    `updated_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
79	    INDEX `idx_path_user_id` (`user_id`),
80	    CONSTRAINT `fk_path_user` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `user` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
81	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
82	
83	-- Learning node table
84	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `learning_node` (
85	    `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
86	    `path_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
87	    `knowledge_id` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,

89	    `status` VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'todo',
90	    `resource_urls` JSON DEFAULT NULL,
91	    INDEX `idx_node_path_id` (`path_id`),
92	    CONSTRAINT `fk_node_path` FOREIGN KEY (`path_id`) REFERENCES `learning_path` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
93	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
94	
95	-- Learning record table
96	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `learning_record` (

98	    `user_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
99	    `action_type` VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL,
100	    `target_id` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,

104	) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

130	INSERT INTO `message` (`id`, `conversation_id`, `role`, `content`, `sources`, `created_at`) VALUES
131	(1,  1, 'user',      'Spring Boot 如何整合 Redis？', NULL, '2026-03-10 09:00:00'),
132	(2,  1, 'assistant', '## Spring Boot 整合 Redis\n\nSpring Boot 整合 Redis 非常简单，主要分以下几步：\n\n### 1. 添加依赖\n\n```xml\n<dependency>\n    <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>\n    <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-redis</artifactId>\n</dependency>\n```\n\n### 2. 配置连接信息\n\n```yaml\nspring:\n  redis:\n    host: localhost\n    port: 6379\n    password: your-password\n    database: 0\n```\n\n### 3. 使用 RedisTemplate\n\n```java\n@Autowired\nprivate RedisTemplate<String, Object> redisTemplate;\n\npublic void setValue(String key, Object value) {\n    redisTemplate.opsForValue().set(key, value);\n}\n\npublic Object getValue(String key) {\n    return redisTemplate.opsForValue().get(key);\n}\n```\n\n### 原理说明\n\nSpring Boot 通过 `spring-boot-starter-data-redis` 自动配置了 `RedisConnectionFactory` 和 `RedisTemplate`，底层使用 Lettuce 作为 Redis 客户端。', '["redis", "spring-boot"]', '2026-03-10 09:00:30'),
133	(3,  1, 'user',      '如何配置 Redis 序列化方式？', NULL, '2026-03-10 09:05:00'),
134	(4,  1, 'assistant', '## Redis 序列化配置\n\n默认的 `RedisTemplate` 使用 JDK 序列化，建议替换为 JSON 序列化：\n\n```java\n@Configuration\npublic class RedisConfig {\n\n    @Bean\n    public RedisTemplate<String, Object> redisTemplate(RedisConnectionFactory factory) {\n        RedisTemplate<String, Object> template = new RedisTemplate<>();\n        template.setConnectionFactory(factory);\n        \n        // Key 使用 String 序列化\n        template.setKeySerializer(new StringRedisSerializer());\n        template.setHashKeySerializer(new StringRedisSerializer());\n        \n        // Value 使用 JSON 序列化\n        Jackson2JsonRedisSerializer<Object> jsonSerializer = \n            new Jackson2JsonRedisSerializer<>(Object.class);\n        template.setValueSerializer(jsonSerializer);\n        template.setHashValueSerializer(jsonSerializer);\n        \n        template.afterPropertiesSet();\n        return template;\n    }\n}\n```\n\n这样存储的数据在 Redis 中可读性更好，也便于其他语言读取。', '["redis", "spring-boot"]', '2026-03-10 09:05:30');
135	
136	-- 会话2: MyBatis-Plus 分页查询
137	INSERT INTO `message` (`id`, `conversation_id`, `role`, `content`, `sources`, `created_at`) VALUES
138	(5,  2, 'user',      'MyBatis-Plus 怎么实现分页查询？', NULL, '2026-03-12 14:00:00'),
139	(6,  2, 'assistant', '## MyBatis-Plus 分页查询\n\n### 1. 配置分页插件\n\n```java\n@Configuration\npublic class MyBatisPlusConfig {\n    @Bean\n    public MybatisPlusInterceptor mybatisPlusInterceptor() {\n        MybatisPlusInterceptor interceptor = new MybatisPlusInterceptor();\n        interceptor.addInnerInterceptor(new PaginationInnerInterceptor(DbType.MYSQL));\n        return interceptor;\n    }\n}\n```\n\n### 2. 使用分页\n\n```java\n// Service 层\npublic IPage<User> getUserPage(int current, int size) {\n    Page<User> page = new Page<>(current, size);\n    return userMapper.selectPage(page, null);\n}\n\n// 带条件的分页查询\npublic IPage<User> searchUsers(int current, int size, String keyword) {\n    Page<User> page = new Page<>(current, size);\n    LambdaQueryWrapper<User> wrapper = new LambdaQueryWrapper<>();\n    wrapper.like(User::getUsername, keyword);\n    return userMapper.selectPage(page, wrapper);\n}\n```\n\n### 原理\n\nMyBatis-Plus 的分页插件会拦截 SQL，自动添加 `LIMIT` 语句，并执行 `COUNT` 查询获取总记录数。', '["mybatis-plus", "mysql"]', '2026-03-12 14:00:45'),
140	(7,  2, 'user',      '如何自定义分页 SQL？', NULL, '2026-03-12 14:10:00'),
141	(8,  2, 'assistant', '## 自定义分页 SQL\n\n在 Mapper 接口中定义方法，第一个参数为 `IPage`：\n\n```java\n// Mapper 接口\n@Mapper\npublic interface UserMapper extends BaseMapper<User> {\n    IPage<UserVO> selectUserPage(IPage<UserVO> page, @Param(\"keyword\") String keyword);\n}\n```\n\n```xml\n<!-- UserMapper.xml -->\n<select id=\"selectUserPage\" resultType=\"com.example.vo.UserVO\">\n    SELECT u.id, u.username, u.email, COUNT(c.id) as chat_count\n    FROM user u\n    LEFT JOIN conversation c ON u.id = c.user_id\n    WHERE u.username LIKE CONCAT(\'%\', #{keyword}, \'%\')\n    GROUP BY u.id\n</select>\n```\n\nMyBatis-Plus 会自动为自定义 SQL 添加分页支持。', '["mybatis-plus"]', '2026-03-12 14:10:30');
142	
143	-- 会话3: Vue3 Composition API
144	INSERT INTO `message` (`id`, `conversation_id`, `role`, `content`, `sources`, `created_at`) VALUES
145	(9,  3, 'user',      'Vue3 的 Composition API 怎么用？和 Options API 有什么区别？', NULL, '2026-03-15 10:00:00'),
146	(10, 3, 'assistant', '## Vue 3 Composition API\n\n### 基本用法\n\n```vue\n<script setup lang=\"ts\">\nimport { ref, computed, onMounted } from \"vue\"\n\n// 响应式状态\nconst count = ref(0)\nconst doubleCount = computed(() => count.value * 2)\n\n// 方法\nfunction increment() {\n  count.value++\n}\n\n// 生命周期\nonMounted(() => {\n  console.log(\"组件已挂载\")\n})\n</script>\n\n<template>\n  <button @click=\"increment\">{{ count }} x 2 = {{ doubleCount }}</button>\n</template>\n```\n\n### 与 Options API 的区别\n\n| 特性 | Options API | Composition API |\n|------|------------|----------------|\n| 代码组织 | 按选项类型分组 | 按逻辑功能分组 |\n| 逻辑复用 | Mixins（有命名冲突） | Composables（清晰明确） |\n| TypeScript | 支持较弱 | 完美支持 |\n| 代码量 | 较多模板代码 | 更简洁 |\n\nComposition API 最大的优势在于**逻辑关注点的聚合**，相关代码放在一起，项目越大优势越明显。', '["vue3", "javascript"]', '2026-03-15 10:01:00');
147	
148	-- 会话4: Java集合框架
149	INSERT INTO `message` (`id`, `conversation_id`, `role`, `content`, `sources`, `created_at`) VALUES
150	(11, 4, 'user',      'Java 中 ArrayList 和 LinkedList 有什么区别？', NULL, '2026-03-11 16:00:00'),
151	(12, 4, 'assistant', '## ArrayList vs LinkedList\n\n### 底层实现\n- **ArrayList**: 基于动态数组，内存连续\n- **LinkedList**: 基于双向链表，内存不连续\n\n### 性能对比\n\n| 操作 | ArrayList | LinkedList |\n|------|-----------|------------|\n| 随机访问 get(i) | O(1) ✅ | O(n) ❌ |\n| 尾部添加 add() | O(1) 均摊 | O(1) |\n| 头部插入 add(0,e) | O(n) ❌ | O(1) ✅ |\n| 中间插入 | O(n) | O(n) |\n| 内存占用 | 较小 | 较大（需存储前后指针） |\n\n### 使用建议\n\n```java\n// 大部分场景用 ArrayList（随机访问多）\nList<String> list = new ArrayList<>();\n\n// 频繁在头部/中间插入删除用 LinkedList\nDeque<String> deque = new LinkedList<>();\n```\n\n**实际开发中 90% 以上场景用 ArrayList 即可**，因为 CPU 缓存对连续内存更友好。', '["java", "data-structures"]', '2026-03-11 16:00:45');
152	
153	-- 会话5: MySQL索引优化
154	INSERT INTO `message` (`id`, `conversation_id`, `role`, `content`, `sources`, `created_at`) VALUES
155	(13, 5, 'user',      'MySQL 怎么优化慢查询？索引该怎么加？', NULL, '2026-03-14 11:00:00'),
156	(14, 5, 'assistant', '## MySQL 慢查询优化\n\n### 1. 开启慢查询日志\n\n```sql\nSET GLOBAL slow_query_log = ON;\nSET GLOBAL long_query_time = 1;  -- 超过1秒记录\n```\n\n### 2. 使用 EXPLAIN 分析\n\n```sql\nEXPLAIN SELECT * FROM user WHERE username = ''zhangsan'';\n```\n\n关注 `type` 列：ALL(全表) > index > range > ref > const\n\n### 3. 索引优化原则\n\n```sql\n-- 单列索引\nCREATE INDEX idx_username ON user(username);\n\n-- 联合索引（遵循最左前缀原则）\nCREATE INDEX idx_user_status_time ON order(user_id, status, created_at);\n\n-- 覆盖索引（避免回表）\nSELECT user_id, status FROM order WHERE user_id = 1;\n```\n\n### 4. 常见优化技巧\n- 避免 `SELECT *`，只查需要的字段\n- 避免在索引列上使用函数：`WHERE YEAR(created_at) = 2024` ❌\n- 用 `LIMIT` 限制返回行数\n- 大表分页用游标分页替代 `OFFSET`', '["mysql", "database"]', '2026-03-14 11:01:00');
157	
158	-- 会话6: Docker Compose
159	INSERT INTO `message` (`id`, `conversation_id`, `role`, `content`, `sources`, `created_at`) VALUES
160	(15, 6, 'user',      'Docker Compose 如何编排多个服务？', NULL, '2026-03-13 08:00:00'),
161	(16, 6, 'assistant', '## Docker Compose 多服务编排\n\n### 示例：Spring Boot + MySQL + Redis\n\n```yaml\nversion: \"3.8\"\nservices:\n  mysql:\n    image: mysql:8.0\n    environment:\n      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: root123\n      MYSQL_DATABASE: myapp\n    ports:\n      - \"3306:3306\"\n    volumes:\n      - mysql-data:/var/lib/mysql\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"mysqladmin\", \"ping\", \"-h\", \"localhost\"]\n      interval: 10s\n      timeout: 5s\n      retries: 5\n\n  redis:\n    image: redis:7-alpine\n    ports:\n      - \"6379:6379\"\n\n  app:\n    build: .\n    ports:\n      - \"8080:8080\"\n    depends_on:\n      mysql:\n        condition: service_healthy\n    environment:\n      SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: jdbc:mysql://mysql:3306/myapp\n\nvolumes:\n  mysql-data:\n```\n\n### 常用命令\n\n```bash\ndocker-compose up -d          # 后台启动\ndocker-compose logs -f app    # 查看日志\ndocker-compose down -v        # 停止并删除卷\n```\n\n关键点：服务间通过**服务名**互相访问（如 `mysql:3306`），Docker Compose 自动创建网络。', '["docker"]', '2026-03-13 08:01:00');
162	
163	-- 会话7: 设计模式
164	INSERT INTO `message` (`id`, `conversation_id`, `role`, `content`, `sources`, `created_at`) VALUES
165	(17, 7, 'user',      '工厂模式和策略模式分别在什么场景下使用？', NULL, '2026-03-16 15:00:00'),
166	(18, 7, 'assistant', '## 工厂模式 vs 策略模式\n\n### 工厂模式（Factory）\n\n**场景**：根据条件创建不同类型的对象\n\n```java\npublic interface MessageSender {\n    void send(String message);\n}\n\npublic class SenderFactory {\n    public static MessageSender create(String type) {\n        return switch (type) {\n            case \"email\" -> new EmailSender();\n            case \"sms\" -> new SmsSender();\n            case \"wechat\" -> new WechatSender();\n            default -> throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"Unknown type: \" + type);\n        };\n    }\n}\n```\n\n### 策略模式（Strategy）\n\n**场景**：运行时动态切换算法/行为\n\n```java\npublic interface PricingStrategy {\n    double calculate(double price);\n}\n\n@Service\npublic class OrderService {\n    private final Map<String, PricingStrategy> strategies;\n    \n    public double calculatePrice(String vipLevel, double price) {\n        return strategies.get(vipLevel).calculate(price);\n    }\n}\n```\n\n### 核心区别\n\n| | 工厂模式 | 策略模式 |\n|--|---------|--------|\n| 关注点 | **创建**对象 | **使用**对象 |\n| 目的 | 封装对象创建逻辑 | 封装可互换的算法 |\n| 典型场景 | 数据库驱动选择 | 支付方式、排序算法 |\n\n实际项目中两者经常**组合使用**：工厂负责创建策略对象，策略负责执行具体逻辑。', '["design-patterns", "java"]', '2026-03-16 15:01:00');
167

179	-- -------------------- 代码片段 --------------------
180	INSERT INTO `code_snippet` (`id`, `user_id`, `title`, `code`, `language`, `description`, `tags`, `use_count`, `created_at`, `updated_at`) VALUES
181	(1, 1, 'Spring Boot 跨域配置', '@Configuration\npublic class CorsConfig implements WebMvcConfigurer {\n    @Override\n    public void addCorsMappings(CorsRegistry registry) {\n        registry.addMapping(\"/api/**\")\n            .allowedOriginPatterns(\"*\")\n            .allowedMethods(\"GET\", \"POST\", \"PUT\", \"DELETE\")\n            .allowedHeaders(\"*\")\n            .allowCredentials(true)\n            .maxAge(3600);\n    }\n}', 'java', 'Spring Boot 全局跨域配置，允许前端跨域访问 API', '["spring-boot", "cors", "配置"]', 12, '2026-02-01 10:00:00', '2026-03-18 09:00:00'),
182	
183	(2, 1, 'MyBatis-Plus 通用分页查询', 'public <T> PageResult<T> queryPage(IPage<T> page, LambdaQueryWrapper<T> wrapper) {\n    IPage<T> result = baseMapper.selectPage(page, wrapper);\n    return new PageResult<>(\n        result.getRecords(),\n        result.getTotal(),\n        (int) result.getCurrent(),\n        (int) result.getSize()\n    );\n}', 'java', 'MyBatis-Plus 封装的通用分页查询方法', '["mybatis-plus", "分页", "工具"]', 8, '2026-02-10 14:00:00', '2026-03-15 11:00:00'),
184	
185	(3, 1, 'Vue3 防抖 Hook', 'import { ref } from \"vue\"\n\nexport function useDebounce<T>(value: T, delay = 300) {\n  const debouncedValue = ref(value)\n  let timer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>\n\n  function update(newValue: T) {\n    clearTimeout(timer)\n    timer = setTimeout(() => {\n      debouncedValue.value = newValue as any\n    }, delay)\n  }\n\n  return { debouncedValue, update }\n}', 'typescript', 'Vue 3 组合式 API 防抖 Hook', '["vue3", "hooks", "typescript"]', 5, '2026-02-15 09:00:00', '2026-03-10 08:00:00'),
186	
187	(4, 1, 'Axios 请求拦截器', 'import axios from \"axios\"\n\nconst request = axios.create({\n  baseURL: \"/api\",\n  timeout: 15000,\n})\n\nrequest.interceptors.request.use(\n  (config) => {\n    const token = localStorage.getItem(\"token\")\n    if (token) {\n      config.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`\n    }\n    return config\n  },\n  (error) => Promise.reject(error)\n)\n\nrequest.interceptors.response.use(\n  (response) => response.data,\n  (error) => {\n    if (error.response?.status === 401) {\n      localStorage.removeItem(\"token\")\n      window.location.href = \"/login\"\n    }\n    return Promise.reject(error)\n  }\n)\n\nexport default request', 'typescript', 'Axios 封装：自动附加 JWT Token，401 自动跳转登录', '["axios", "jwt", "typescript"]', 15, '2026-01-20 11:00:00', '2026-03-19 10:00:00'),
188	
189	(5, 2, 'Java Stream 常用操作', 'List<String> names = users.stream()\n    .filter(u -> u.getAge() > 18)\n    .sorted(Comparator.comparing(User::getName))\n    .map(User::getName)\n    .distinct()\n    .collect(Collectors.toList());\n\n// 分组\nMap<String, List<User>> grouped = users.stream()\n    .collect(Collectors.groupingBy(User::getDepartment));\n\n// 统计\nDoubleSummaryStatistics stats = users.stream()\n    .mapToDouble(User::getSalary)\n    .summaryStatistics();', 'java', 'Java Stream API 常用操作速查', '["java", "stream", "集合"]', 20, '2026-01-25 15:00:00', '2026-03-17 13:00:00'),
190	
191	(6, 2, 'MySQL 建表模板', 'CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `table_name` (\n    `id`         BIGINT       NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT ''主键'',\n    `name`       VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT ''名称'',\n    `status`     TINYINT      NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 COMMENT ''状态: 0-禁用 1-启用'',\n    `created_at` DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT ''创建时间'',\n    `updated_at` DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT ''更新时间'',\n    `deleted`    TINYINT      NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT ''逻辑删除: 0-未删除 1-已删除'',\n    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),\n    KEY `idx_status` (`status`),\n    KEY `idx_created_at` (`created_at`)\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT=''表注释'';', 'sql', 'MySQL 标准建表模板，包含逻辑删除和时间戳', '["mysql", "sql", "模板"]', 10, '2026-02-05 10:00:00', '2026-03-12 15:00:00'),
192	
193	(7, 3, 'Docker 多阶段构建 Dockerfile', 'FROM maven:3.9-eclipse-temurin-21 AS build\nWORKDIR /app\nCOPY pom.xml .\nRUN mvn dependency:go-offline -B\nCOPY src ./src\nRUN mvn package -DskipTests -B\n\nFROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-alpine\nWORKDIR /app\nCOPY --from=build /app/target/*.jar app.jar\nEXPOSE 8080\nENTRYPOINT [\"java\", \"-jar\", \"app.jar\"]', 'dockerfile', 'Spring Boot 项目多阶段构建 Dockerfile，减小镜像体积', '["docker", "spring-boot", "部署"]', 7, '2026-02-20 16:00:00', '2026-03-14 09:00:00'),
194	
195	(8, 3, 'Git 常用命令速查', '# 分支操作\ngit checkout -b feature/xxx     # 创建并切换分支\ngit merge --no-ff feature/xxx   # 合并分支（保留提交历史）\ngit branch -d feature/xxx       # 删除已合并分支\n\n# 暂存操作\ngit stash                       # 暂存当前修改\ngit stash pop                   # 恢复暂存\n\n# 回退操作\ngit reset --soft HEAD~1         # 撤销最近一次提交（保留修改）\ngit checkout -- file.txt        # 丢弃文件修改\n\n# 查看历史\ngit log --oneline --graph -20   # 图形化查看最近20条', 'bash', 'Git 日常开发常用命令', '["git", "工具", "命令"]', 18, '2026-01-18 14:00:00', '2026-03-20 10:00:00');
196

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./\backend\src\main\java\com\coding\assistant\controller\ChatController.java`

```text
1	package com.coding.assistant.controller;
2	
3	import com.coding.assistant.dto.*;
4	import com.coding.assistant.security.SecurityUtil;
5	import com.coding.assistant.service.ChatService;
6	import com.coding.assistant.service.FeedbackService;
7	import com.coding.assistant.service.ProgressService;
8	import jakarta.validation.Valid;
9	import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
10	import org.springframework.http.MediaType;
11	import org.springframework.http.codec.ServerSentEvent;
12	import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
13	import reactor.core.publisher.Flux;
14	
15	import java.util.List;
16	
17	@RestController
18	@RequestMapping("/api/chat")
19	@RequiredArgsConstructor
20	public class ChatController {
21	
22	    private final ChatService chatService;
23	    private final FeedbackService feedbackService;
24	    private final ProgressService progressService;
25	
26	    @PostMapping(value = "/send", produces = MediaType.TEXT_EVENT_STREAM_VALUE)
27	    public Flux<ServerSentEvent<String>> sendMessage(@Valid @RequestBody ChatSendRequest request) {
28	        Long userId = SecurityUtil.getCurrentUserId();
29	
30	        // Record chat action
31	        progressService.recordAction(userId, "chat", null);
32	
33	        return chatService.sendMessage(userId, request)
34	                .map(content -> ServerSentEvent.<String>builder()
35	                        .data(content)
36	                        .build())
37	                .concatWith(Flux.just(ServerSentEvent.<String>builder()
38	                        .event("done")
39	                        .data("[DONE]")
40	                        .build()));
41	    }
42	
43	    @GetMapping("/conversations")
44	    public ApiResponse<List<ConversationVO>> getConversations() {
45	        Long userId = SecurityUtil.getCurrentUserId();
46	        List<ConversationVO> conversations = chatService.getConversations(userId);
47	        return ApiResponse.success(conversations);
48	    }
49	
50	    @GetMapping("/conversations/{id}/messages")
51	    public ApiResponse<List<MessageVO>> getMessages(@PathVariable Long id) {
52	        Long userId = SecurityUtil.getCurrentUserId();
53	        List<MessageVO> messages = chatService.getMessages(userId, id);
54	        return ApiResponse.success(messages);
55	    }
56	
57	    @DeleteMapping("/conversations/{id}")
58	    public ApiResponse<Void> deleteConversation(@PathVariable Long id) {
59	        Long userId = SecurityUtil.getCurrentUserId();
60	        chatService.deleteConversation(userId, id);
61	        return ApiResponse.success();
62	    }
63	
64	    @PostMapping("/feedback")
65	    public ApiResponse<Void> submitFeedback(@Valid @RequestBody FeedbackRequest request) {
66	        Long userId = SecurityUtil.getCurrentUserId();
67	        feedbackService.submit(userId, request);
68	        progressService.recordAction(userId, "feedback", String.valueOf(request.getMessageId()));
69	        return ApiResponse.success();
70	    }
71	}
```
</details></tool-use>

## 1. src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/service/ChatService.java

```java
package com.coding.assistant.service;

import com.coding.assistant.ai.ChatMessage;
import com.coding.assistant.ai.LlmProviderFactory;
import com.coding.assistant.dto.ConversationVO;
import com.coding.assistant.dto.KnowledgeNodeVO;
import com.coding.assistant.dto.MessageVO;
import com.coding.assistant.dto.ChatSendRequest;
import com.coding.assistant.entity.Conversation;
import com.coding.assistant.entity.Message;
import com.coding.assistant.exception.BusinessException;
import com.coding.assistant.mapper.ConversationMapper;
import com.coding.assistant.mapper.MessageMapper;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;
import org.springframework.util.DigestUtils;
import reactor.core.publisher.Flux;

import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;
import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Optional;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

@Slf4j
@Service
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class ChatService {

    private final ConversationMapper conversationMapper;
    private final MessageMapper messageMapper;
    private final LlmProviderFactory llmProviderFactory;
    private final KnowledgeRetrievalService knowledgeRetrievalService;
    private final ChatCacheService chatCacheService;

    private static final String SYSTEM_PROMPT = """
            You are an intelligent coding assistant. You help developers with programming questions, \
            code reviews, debugging, and learning new technologies. \
            When answering questions, use the provided knowledge context if available. \
            Be concise, accurate, and provide code examples when appropriate. \
            If you're unsure about something, say so rather than guessing.""";

    @Transactional
    public Flux<String> sendMessage(Long userId, ChatSendRequest request) {
        // Create or get conversation
        Conversation conversation;
        if (request.getConversationId() == null) {
            conversation = Conversation.builder()
                    .userId(userId)
                    .title(generateTitle(request.getContent()))
                    .createdAt(LocalDateTime.now())
                    .updatedAt(LocalDateTime.now())
                    .build();
            conversationMapper.insert(conversation);
        } else {
            conversation = conversationMapper.selectById(request.getConversationId());
            if (conversation == null || !conversation.getUserId().equals(userId)) {
                throw new BusinessException(404, "Conversation not found");
            }
            conversation.setUpdatedAt(LocalDateTime.now());
            conversationMapper.updateById(conversation);
        }

        // Save user message
        Message userMessage = Message.builder()
                .conversationId(conversation.getId())
                .role("user")
                .content(request.getContent())
                .createdAt(LocalDateTime.now())
                .build();
        messageMapper.insert(userMessage);

        Long conversationId = conversation.getId();
        String questionHash = createQuestionHash(request.getContent());

        // 1) 热点问答缓存：命中直接返回
        Optional<ChatCacheService.QaCacheEntry> cachedAnswer = chatCacheService.getCachedAnswer(questionHash);
        if (cachedAnswer.isPresent()) {
            ChatCacheService.QaCacheEntry cacheEntry = cachedAnswer.get();
            Message assistantMessage = Message.builder()
                    .conversationId(conversationId)
                    .role("assistant")
                    .content(cacheEntry.getAnswer())
                    .sources(cacheEntry.getSourcesJson())
                    .createdAt(LocalDateTime.now())
                    .build();
            messageMapper.insert(assistantMessage);

            updateConversationContextCache(conversationId, request.getContent(), cacheEntry.getAnswer());
            log.info("QA_CACHE_HIT questionHash={} conversationId={}", questionHash, conversationId);
            return Flux.just(cacheEntry.getAnswer());
        }
        log.info("QA_CACHE_MISS questionHash={} conversationId={}", questionHash, conversationId);

        // 2) 知识召回（仅在未命中缓存时执行）
        List<KnowledgeNodeVO> knowledgeNodes = knowledgeRetrievalService.retrieve(request.getContent());
        String knowledgeContext = knowledgeRetrievalService.buildContext(knowledgeNodes);

        // 3) 会话上下文缓存：命中 Redis，否则回退 DB
        List<ChatMessage> chatMessages;
        Optional<List<ChatMessage>> cachedContext = chatCacheService.getConversationContext(conversationId);
        if (cachedContext.isPresent() && !cachedContext.get().isEmpty()) {
            chatMessages = new ArrayList<>(cachedContext.get());
            chatMessages.add(ChatMessage.user(request.getContent()));
            log.info("CTX_CACHE_HIT conversationId={}", conversationId);
        } else {
            List<Message> history = messageMapper.selectByConversationIdOrderByCreatedAt(conversationId);
            chatMessages = history.stream()
                    .map(m -> new ChatMessage(m.getRole(), m.getContent()))
                    .collect(Collectors.toCollection(ArrayList::new));
            log.info("CTX_CACHE_MISS conversationId={}, fallback=db", conversationId);
        }

        // Build system prompt with knowledge context
        String systemPrompt = SYSTEM_PROMPT;
        if (!knowledgeContext.isEmpty()) {
            systemPrompt = systemPrompt + "\n\n" + knowledgeContext;
        }

        // Stream LLM response
        StringBuilder responseBuilder = new StringBuilder();

        return llmProviderFactory.getProvider()
                .chatStream(chatMessages, systemPrompt)
                .doOnNext(responseBuilder::append)
                .doOnComplete(() -> {
                    String sourcesJson = knowledgeNodes.isEmpty() ? null :
                            knowledgeNodes.stream()
                                    .map(n -> "\"" + n.getId() + "\"")
                                    .collect(Collectors.joining(",", "[", "]"));

                    String answer = responseBuilder.toString();

                    Message assistantMessage = Message.builder()
                            .conversationId(conversationId)
                            .role("assistant")
                            .content(answer)
                            .sources(sourcesJson)
                            .createdAt(LocalDateTime.now())
                            .build();
                    messageMapper.insert(assistantMessage);

                    // 写入 Redis（热点问答 + 会话上下文）
                    chatCacheService.cacheAnswer(questionHash, answer, sourcesJson);
                    updateConversationContextCache(conversationId, request.getContent(), answer);

                    log.debug("Assistant message saved for conversation {}", conversationId);
                })
                .doOnError(e -> log.error("Error during chat stream: {}", e.getMessage()));
    }

    public List<ConversationVO> getConversations(Long userId) {
        List<Conversation> conversations = conversationMapper.selectByUserIdOrderByUpdatedAtDesc(userId);
        return conversations.stream()
                .map(this::toConversationVO)
                .collect(Collectors.toList());
    }

    public List<MessageVO> getMessages(Long userId, Long conversationId) {
        Conversation conversation = conversationMapper.selectById(conversationId);
        if (conversation == null || !conversation.getUserId().equals(userId)) {
            throw new BusinessException(404, "Conversation not found");
        }

        List<Message> messages = messageMapper.selectByConversationIdOrderByCreatedAt(conversationId);
        return messages.stream()
                .map(this::toMessageVO)
                .collect(Collectors.toList());
    }

    @Transactional
    public void deleteConversation(Long userId, Long conversationId) {
        Conversation conversation = conversationMapper.selectById(conversationId);
        if (conversation == null || !conversation.getUserId().equals(userId)) {
            throw new BusinessException(404, "Conversation not found");
        }

        messageMapper.deleteByConversationId(conversationId);
        conversationMapper.deleteById(conversationId);
        log.info("Conversation {} deleted by user {}", conversationId, userId);
    }

    /**
     * 生成学习路径（非流式调用）
     */
    public String generateLearningPath(String prompt) {
        try {
            log.info("Calling AI to generate learning path with prompt: {}", prompt);

            List<ChatMessage> messages = new ArrayList<>();
            messages.add(new ChatMessage("user", prompt));

            String response = llmProviderFactory.getProvider().chat(messages, SYSTEM_PROMPT);

            log.info("AI response for learning path received, length: {}", response != null ? response.length() : 0);
            return response;

        } catch (Exception e) {
            log.error("Failed to generate learning path: {}", e.getMessage(), e);
            return null;
        }
    }

    private String generateTitle(String content) {
        if (content.length() <= 50) {
            return content;
        }
        return content.substring(0, 47) + "...";
    }

    private String createQuestionHash(String content) {
        String normalized = content == null ? "" : content.trim().toLowerCase();
        return DigestUtils.md5DigestAsHex(normalized.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8));
    }

    private void updateConversationContextCache(Long conversationId, String question, String answer) {
        List<ChatMessage> context = chatCacheService.getConversationContext(conversationId)
                .map(ArrayList::new)
                .orElseGet(ArrayList::new);

        context.add(ChatMessage.user(question));
        context.add(ChatMessage.assistant(answer));

        int maxMessages = 20;
        if (context.size() > maxMessages) {
            context = new ArrayList<>(context.subList(context.size() - maxMessages, context.size()));
        }

        chatCacheService.saveConversationContext(conversationId, context);
    }

    private ConversationVO toConversationVO(Conversation conversation) {
        return ConversationVO.builder()
                .id(conversation.getId())
                .title(conversation.getTitle())
                .createdAt(conversation.getCreatedAt())
                .updatedAt(conversation.getUpdatedAt())
                .build();
    }

    private MessageVO toMessageVO(Message message) {
        return MessageVO.builder()
                .id(message.getId())
                .conversationId(message.getConversationId())
                .role(message.getRole())
                .content(message.getContent())
                .sources(message.getSources())
                .createdAt(message.getCreatedAt())
                .build();
    }
}
```

## 3. src/main/resources/schema.sql

(Complete file - 369 lines total, showing all content as requested)

```sql
CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS coding_assistant DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

USE coding_assistant;

-- User table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `user` (
    `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    `username` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    `password` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    `email` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    `avatar` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,
    `level` VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'beginner',
    `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    `updated_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    INDEX `idx_user_username` (`username`),
    INDEX `idx_user_email` (`email`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Conversation table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `conversation` (
    `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    `user_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
    `title` VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL,
    `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    `updated_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    INDEX `idx_conversation_user_id` (`user_id`),
    CONSTRAINT `fk_conversation_user` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `user` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Message table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `message` (
    `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    `conversation_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
    `role` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    `content` TEXT NOT NULL,
    `sources` JSON DEFAULT NULL,
    `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    INDEX `idx_message_conversation_id` (`conversation_id`),
    CONSTRAINT `fk_message_conversation` FOREIGN KEY (`conversation_id`) REFERENCES `conversation` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Feedback table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `feedback` (
    `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    `message_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
    `user_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
    `rating` VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
    `comment` TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
    `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    UNIQUE KEY `uk_feedback_message_user` (`message_id`, `user_id`),
    CONSTRAINT `fk_feedback_message` FOREIGN KEY (`message_id`) REFERENCES `message` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    CONSTRAINT `fk_feedback_user` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `user` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Code snippet table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `code_snippet` (
    `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    `user_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
    `title` VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
    `code` TEXT NOT NULL,
    `language` VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL,
    `description` TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
    `tags` JSON DEFAULT NULL,
    `use_count` INT DEFAULT 0,
    `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    `updated_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    INDEX `idx_snippet_user_id` (`user_id`),
    CONSTRAINT `fk_snippet_user` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `user` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Learning path table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `learning_path` (
    `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    `user_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
    `target` VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
    `status` VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'active',
    `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    `updated_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    INDEX `idx_path_user_id` (`user_id`),
    CONSTRAINT `fk_path_user` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `user` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Learning node table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `learning_node` (
    `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    `path_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
    `knowledge_id` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    `node_order` INT NOT NULL,
    `status` VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'todo',
    `resource_urls` JSON DEFAULT NULL,
    INDEX `idx_node_path_id` (`path_id`),
    CONSTRAINT `fk_node_path` FOREIGN KEY (`path_id`) REFERENCES `learning_path` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Learning record table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `learning_record` (
    `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    `user_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
    `action_type` VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL,
    `target_id` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
    `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    INDEX `idx_record_user_created` (`user_id`, `created_at`),
    CONSTRAINT `fk_record_user` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `user` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- 会话1: Spring Boot 整合 Redis
INSERT INTO `message` (`id`, `conversation_id`, `role`, `content`, `sources`, `created_at`) VALUES
(1,  1, 'user',      'Spring Boot 如何整合 Redis？', NULL, '2026-03-10 09:00:00'),
(2,  1, 'assistant', '## Spring Boot 整合 Redis\n\nSpring Boot 整合 Redis 非常简单，主要分以下几步：\n\n### 1. 添加依赖\n\n```xml\n<dependency>\n    <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>\n    <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-redis</artifactId>\n</dependency>\n```\n\n### 2. 配置连接信息\n\n```yaml\nspring:\n  redis:\n    host: localhost\n    port: 6379\n    password: your-password\n    database: 0\n```\n\n### 3. 使用 RedisTemplate\n\n```java\n@Autowired\nprivate RedisTemplate<String, Object> redisTemplate;\n\npublic void setValue(String key, Object value) {\n    redisTemplate.opsForValue().set(key, value);\n}\n\npublic Object getValue(String key) {\n    return redisTemplate.opsForValue().get(key);\n}\n```\n\n### 原理说明\n\nSpring Boot 通过 `spring-boot-starter-data-redis` 自动配置了 `RedisConnectionFactory` 和 `RedisTemplate`，底层使用 Lettuce 作为 Redis 客户端。', '["redis", "spring-boot"]', '2026-03-10 09:00:30'),
(3,  1, 'user',      '如何配置 Redis 序列化方式？', NULL, '2026-03-10 09:05:00'),
(4,  1, 'assistant', '## Redis 序列化配置\n\n默认的 `RedisTemplate` 使用 JDK 序列化，建议替换为 JSON 序列化：\n\n```java\n@Configuration\npublic class RedisConfig {\n\n    @Bean\n    public RedisTemplate<String, Object> redisTemplate(RedisConnectionFactory factory) {\n        RedisTemplate<String, Object> template = new RedisTemplate<>();\n        template.setConnectionFactory(factory);\n        \n        // Key 使用 String 序列化\n        template.setKeySerializer(new StringRedisSerializer());\n        template.setHashKeySerializer(new StringRedisSerializer());\n        \n        // Value 使用 JSON 序列化\n        Jackson2JsonRedisSerializer<Object> jsonSerializer = \n            new Jackson2JsonRedisSerializer<>(Object.class);\n        template.setValueSerializer(jsonSerializer);\n        template.setHashValueSerializer(jsonSerializer);\n        \n        template.afterPropertiesSet();\n        return template;\n    }\n}\n```\n\n这样存储的数据在 Redis 中可读性更好，也便于其他语言读取。', '["redis", "spring-boot"]', '2026-03-10 09:05:30');

-- 会话2: MyBatis-Plus 分页查询
INSERT INTO `message` (`id`, `conversation_id`, `role`, `content`, `sources`, `created_at`) VALUES
(5,  2, 'user',      'MyBatis-Plus 怎么实现分页查询？', NULL, '2026-03-12 14:00:00'),
(6,  2, 'assistant', '## MyBatis-Plus 分页查询\n\n### 1. 配置分页插件\n\n```java\n@Configuration\npublic class MyBatisPlusConfig {\n    @Bean\n    public MybatisPlusInterceptor mybatisPlusInterceptor() {\n        MybatisPlusInterceptor interceptor = new MybatisPlusInterceptor();\n        interceptor.addInnerInterceptor(new PaginationInnerInterceptor(DbType.MYSQL));\n        return interceptor;\n    }\n}\n```\n\n### 2. 使用分页\n\n```java\n// Service 层\npublic IPage<User> getUserPage(int current, int size) {\n    Page<User> page = new Page<>(current, size);\n    return userMapper.selectPage(page, null);\n}\n\n// 带条件的分页查询\npublic IPage<User> searchUsers(int current, int size, String keyword) {\n    Page<User> page = new Page<>(current, size);\n    LambdaQueryWrapper<User> wrapper = new LambdaQueryWrapper<>();\n    wrapper.like(User::getUsername, keyword);\n    return userMapper.selectPage(page, wrapper);\n}\n```\n\n### 原理\n\nMyBatis-Plus 的分页插件会拦截 SQL，自动添加 `LIMIT` 语句，并执行 `COUNT` 查询获取总记录数。', '["mybatis-plus", "mysql"]', '2026-03-12 14:00:45'),
(7,  2, 'user',      '如何自定义分页 SQL？', NULL, '2026-03-12 14:10:00'),
(8,  2, 'assistant', '## 自定义分页 SQL\n\n在 Mapper 接口中定义方法，第一个参数为 `IPage`：\n\n```java\n// Mapper 接口\n@Mapper\npublic interface UserMapper extends BaseMapper<User> {\n    IPage<UserVO> selectUserPage(IPage<UserVO> page, @Param(\"keyword\") String keyword);\n}\n```\n\n```xml\n<!-- UserMapper.xml -->\n<select id=\"selectUserPage\" resultType=\"com.example.vo.UserVO\">\n    SELECT u.id, u.username, u.email, COUNT(c.id) as chat_count\n    FROM user u\n    LEFT JOIN conversation c ON u.id = c.user_id\n    WHERE u.username LIKE CONCAT(\'%\', #{keyword}, \'%\')\n    GROUP BY u.id\n</select>\n```\n\nMyBatis-Plus 会自动为自定义 SQL 添加分页支持。', '["mybatis-plus"]', '2026-03-12 14:10:30');

-- 会话3: Vue3 Composition API

9	import org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.condition.ConditionalOnProperty;
10	import org.springframework.http.MediaType;
11	import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
12	import org.springframework.web.reactive.function.client.WebClient;
13	import reactor.core.publisher.Flux;
14	
15	import java.util.ArrayList;
16	import java.util.HashMap;
17	import java.util.List;
18	import java.util.Map;

20	@Slf4j
21	@Component("openaiProvider")
22	@ConditionalOnProperty(name = "llm.openai.api-key")
23	public class OpenAiProvider implements LlmProvider {
24	
25	    private final WebClient webClient;
26	    private final LlmConfig.ProviderConfig config;
27	    private final ObjectMapper objectMapper;
28	
29	    public OpenAiProvider(LlmConfig llmConfig, ObjectMapper objectMapper) {
30	        this.config = llmConfig.getOpenai();
31	        this.objectMapper = objectMapper;
32	        this.webClient = WebClient.builder()
33	                .baseUrl(config.getBaseUrl())
34	                .defaultHeader("Authorization", "Bearer " + config.getApiKey())
35	                .defaultHeader("Content-Type", "application/json")
36	                .codecs(configurer -> configurer.defaultCodecs().maxInMemorySize(10 * 1024 * 1024))
37	                .build();
38	    }
39	
40	    @Override
41	    public Flux<String> chatStream(List<ChatMessage> messages, String systemPrompt) {
42	        ObjectNode requestBody = buildRequestBody(messages, systemPrompt, true);
43	
44	        return webClient.post()
45	                .uri("/v1/chat/completions")
46	                .contentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON)
47	                .bodyValue(requestBody.toString())
48	                .retrieve()
49	                .bodyToFlux(String.class)
50	                .filter(data -> !data.equals("[DONE]"))
51	                .map(data -> {
52	                    try {
53	                        JsonNode node = objectMapper.readTree(data);
54	                        JsonNode delta = node.path("choices").path(0).path("delta").path("content");
55	                        return delta.isMissingNode() ? "" : delta.asText();
56	                    } catch (Exception e) {
57	                        log.error("Error parsing SSE data: {}", e.getMessage());
58	                        return "";
59	                    }
60	                })
61	                .filter(s -> !s.isEmpty());
62	    }
63	
64	    @Override
65	    public String chat(List<ChatMessage> messages, String systemPrompt) {
66	        ObjectNode requestBody = buildRequestBody(messages, systemPrompt, false);
67	
68	        String responseBody = webClient.post()
69	                .uri("/v1/chat/completions")
70	                .contentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON)
71	                .bodyValue(requestBody.toString())
72	                .retrieve()
73	                .bodyToMono(String.class)
74	                .block();
75	
76	        try {
77	            JsonNode node = objectMapper.readTree(responseBody);
78	            return node.path("choices").path(0).path("message").path("content").asText();
79	        } catch (Exception e) {
80	            log.error("Error parsing chat response: {}", e.getMessage());
81	            return "Sorry, an error occurred while processing your request.";
82	        }
83	    }
84	
85	    private ObjectNode buildRequestBody(List<ChatMessage> messages, String systemPrompt, boolean stream) {
86	        ObjectNode root = objectMapper.createObjectNode();
87	        root.put("model", config.getModel());
88	        root.put("stream", stream);
89	
90	        ArrayNode messagesArray = root.putArray("messages");
91	
92	        if (systemPrompt != null && !systemPrompt.isEmpty()) {
93	            ObjectNode systemMsg = objectMapper.createObjectNode();
94	            systemMsg.put("role", "system");
95	            systemMsg.put("content", systemPrompt);
96	            messagesArray.add(systemMsg);
97	        }
98	
99	        for (ChatMessage msg : messages) {
100	            ObjectNode msgNode = objectMapper.createObjectNode();
101	            msgNode.put("role", msg.getRole());
102	            msgNode.put("content", msg.getContent());
103	            messagesArray.add(msgNode);
104	        }
105	
106	        return root;
107	    }
108	}

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-04-08 01:48:06Z)**_
