<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```java
package com.coding.assistant.service;

import com.coding.assistant.config.LlmConfig;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.http.MediaType;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import org.springframework.web.reactive.function.client.WebClient;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;

@Slf4j
@Service
public class EmbeddingService {

    private final WebClient webClient;
    private final ObjectMapper objectMapper;
    private static final String EMBEDDING_MODEL = "text-embedding-ada-002";

    public EmbeddingService(LlmConfig llmConfig, ObjectMapper objectMapper) {
        this.objectMapper = objectMapper;
        LlmConfig.ProviderConfig config = llmConfig.getOpenai();
        this.webClient = WebClient.builder()
                .baseUrl(config.getBaseUrl())
                .defaultHeader("Authorization", "Bearer " + config.getApiKey())
                .defaultHeader("Content-Type", "application/json")
                .codecs(c -> c.defaultCodecs().maxInMemorySize(10 * 1024 * 1024))
                .build();
    }

    /**
     * 调用 embedding 接口，返回向量列表
     */
    public List<Double> embed(String text) {
        try {
            ObjectNode body = objectMapper.createObjectNode();
            body.put("model", EMBEDDING_MODEL);
            body.put("input", text);

            String response = webClient.post()
                    .uri("/v1/embeddings")
                    .contentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON)
                    .bodyValue(body.toString())
                    .retrieve()
                    .bodyToMono(String.class)
                    .block();

            JsonNode node = objectMapper.readTree(response);
            JsonNode embeddingArray = node.path("data").path(0).path("embedding");

            List<Double> vector = new ArrayList<>();
            for (JsonNode val : embeddingArray) {
                vector.add(val.asDouble());
            }
            return vector;
        } catch (Exception e) {
            log.error("Embedding failed: {}", e.getMessage());
            return List.of();
        }
    }

    /**
     * 计算两个向量的余弦相似度
     */
    public double cosineSimilarity(List<Double> a, List<Double> b) {
        if (a.isEmpty() || b.isEmpty() || a.size() != b.size()) return 0.0;
        double dot = 0, normA = 0, normB = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < a.size(); i++) {
            dot += a.get(i) * b.get(i);
            normA += a.get(i) * a.get(i);
            normB += b.get(i) * b.get(i);
        }
        return (normA == 0 || normB == 0) ? 0.0 : dot / (Math.sqrt(normA) * Math.sqrt(normB));
    }
}

```

```java
package com.coding.assistant.service;

import com.baomidou.mybatisplus.core.conditions.query.LambdaQueryWrapper;
import com.coding.assistant.entity.KnowledgeDocument;
import com.coding.assistant.mapper.KnowledgeDocumentMapper;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.core.type.TypeReference;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;

import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.Comparator;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

@Slf4j
@Service
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class DocumentService {

    private final KnowledgeDocumentMapper documentMapper;
    private final EmbeddingService embeddingService;
    private final ObjectMapper objectMapper;

    /**
     * 新增文档并自动生成 embedding
     */
    public KnowledgeDocument addDocument(String title, String content, String category) {
        KnowledgeDocument doc = KnowledgeDocument.builder()
                .title(title)
                .content(content)
                .category(category)
                .createdAt(LocalDateTime.now())
                .build();

        // 用 title + content 拼接后向量化
        List<Double> vector = embeddingService.embed(title + "\n" + content);
        if (!vector.isEmpty()) {
            try {
                doc.setEmbedding(objectMapper.writeValueAsString(vector));
            } catch (Exception e) {
                log.error("Failed to serialize embedding: {}", e.getMessage());
            }
        }

        documentMapper.insert(doc);
        return doc;
    }

    /**
     * 向量语义检索，返回 Top-K 最相关文档
     */
    public List<KnowledgeDocument> search(String query, int topK) {
        List<Double> queryVector = embeddingService.embed(query);
        if (queryVector.isEmpty()) {
            return List.of();
        }

        List<KnowledgeDocument> docs = documentMapper.selectAllWithEmbedding();

        return docs.stream()
                .map(doc -> {
                    double score = 0.0;
                    try {
                        List<Double> docVector = objectMapper.readValue(
                                doc.getEmbedding(), new TypeReference<List<Double>>() );
                        score = embeddingService.cosineSimilarity(queryVector, docVector);
                    } catch (Exception e) {
                        log.warn("Failed to parse embedding for doc {}: {}", doc.getId(), e.getMessage());
                    }
                    doc.setEmbedding(String.valueOf(score)); // 临时借用字段传分数
                    return doc;
                })
                .filter(doc -> Double.parseDouble(doc.getEmbedding()) > 0.5) // 相似度阈值
                .sorted(Comparator.comparingDouble(d -> -Double.parseDouble(d.getEmbedding())))
                .limit(topK)
                .peek(doc -> doc.setEmbedding(null)) // 清除分数，不返回给调用方
                .collect(Collectors.toList());
    }

    public List<KnowledgeDocument> listAll() {
        return documentMapper.selectList(
                new LambdaQueryWrapper<KnowledgeDocument>().select(
                        KnowledgeDocument::getId,
                        KnowledgeDocument::getTitle,
                        KnowledgeDocument::getCategory,
                        KnowledgeDocument::getCreatedAt
                )
        );
    }

    public void deleteDocument(Long id) {
        documentMapper.deleteById(id);
    }
}

```

```java
package com.coding.assistant.service;

import com.coding.assistant.dto.KnowledgeNodeVO;
import com.coding.assistant.entity.KnowledgeDocument;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.neo4j.driver.Driver;
import org.neo4j.driver.Record;
import org.neo4j.driver.Result;
import org.neo4j.driver.Session;
import org.neo4j.driver.Values;
import org.neo4j.driver.types.Node;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

@Slf4j
@Service
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class KnowledgeRetrievalService {

    private final Driver neo4jDriver;
    private final DocumentService documentService;

    /**
     * RAG 检索：优先向量语义检索，回退到 Neo4j 关键词检索
     */
    public RetrievalResult retrieve(String question) {
        // 1. 向量语义检索知识文档
        List<KnowledgeDocument> docs = documentService.search(question, 3);

        // 2. Neo4j 关键词检索知识节点（补充结构化知识）
        List<KnowledgeNodeVO> nodes = retrieveFromNeo4j(question);

        return new RetrievalResult(docs, nodes);
    }

    /**
     * 构建注入 LLM 的上下文字符串
     */
    public String buildContext(RetrievalResult result) {
        StringBuilder context = new StringBuilder();

        if (!result.documents().isEmpty()) {
            context.append("以下是从知识库中检索到的相关内容：\n\n");
            for (int i = 0; i < result.documents().size(); i++) {
                KnowledgeDocument doc = result.documents().get(i);
                context.append(String.format("【文档%d】%s\n%s\n\n", i + 1, doc.getTitle(), doc.getContent()));
            }
        }

        if (!result.nodes().isEmpty()) {
            context.append("相关知识点：");
            context.append(result.nodes().stream()
                    .map(n -> n.getName() + (n.getDescription() != null ? "（" + n.getDescription() + "）" : ""))
                    .collect(Collectors.joining("、")));
            context.append("\n");
        }

        return context.toString();
    }

    /** 兼容旧接口：仅返回 Neo4j 节点 */
    public List<KnowledgeNodeVO> retrieve(String question, boolean legacyMode) {
        return retrieveFromNeo4j(question);
    }

    /** 兼容旧接口：buildContext(List<KnowledgeNodeVO>) */
    public String buildContext(List<KnowledgeNodeVO> nodes) {
        if (nodes == null || nodes.isEmpty()) return "";
        StringBuilder context = new StringBuilder("相关知识点：\n\n");
        for (int i = 0; i < nodes.size(); i++) {
            KnowledgeNodeVO node = nodes.get(i);
            context.append(String.format("%d. **%s** [%s]\n", i + 1, node.getName(), node.getCategory()));
            if (node.getDescription() != null && !node.getDescription().isEmpty()) {
                context.append("   ").append(node.getDescription()).append("\n");
            }
        }
        return context.toString();
    }

    private List<KnowledgeNodeVO> retrieveFromNeo4j(String question) {
        List<String> keywords = extractKeywords(question);
        if (keywords.isEmpty()) return List.of();

        List<KnowledgeNodeVO> nodes = new ArrayList<>();
        try (Session session = neo4jDriver.session()) {
            String cypher = "MATCH (n:Knowledge) " +
                    "WHERE ANY(k IN $keywords WHERE toLower(n.name) CONTAINS toLower(k) " +
                    "OR ANY(kw IN n.keywords WHERE toLower(kw) CONTAINS toLower(k))) " +
                    "RETURN n LIMIT 5";
            Result result = session.run(cypher, Values.parameters("keywords", keywords));
            while (result.hasNext()) {
                nodes.add(mapToVO(result.next().get("n").asNode()));
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            log.warn("Neo4j retrieval failed: {}", e.getMessage());
        }
        return nodes;
    }

    private List<String> extractKeywords(String question) {
        String cleaned = question.replaceAll("[^a-zA-Z0-9\\u4e00-\\u9fff\\s]", " ");
        return Arrays.stream(cleaned.split("\\s+"))
                .filter(w -> w.length() >= 2)
                .map(String::toLowerCase)
                .distinct()
                .collect(Collectors.toList());
    }

    private KnowledgeNodeVO mapToVO(Node node) {
        List<String> keywords = new ArrayList<>();
        if (node.containsKey("keywords")) {
            node.get("keywords").asList(v -> v.asString()).forEach(keywords::add);
        }
        return KnowledgeNodeVO.builder()
                .id(node.containsKey("id") ? node.get("id").asString() : String.valueOf(node.id()))
                .name(node.containsKey("name") ? node.get("name").asString() : "")
                .category(node.containsKey("category") ? node.get("category").asString() : "")
                .description(node.containsKey("description") ? node.get("description").asString() : "")
                .difficulty(node.containsKey("difficulty") ? node.get("difficulty").asString() : "")
                .keywords(keywords)
                .build();
    }

    public record RetrievalResult(List<KnowledgeDocument> documents, List<KnowledgeNodeVO> nodes) {}
}

```

```java
package com.coding.assistant.service;

import com.coding.assistant.dto.KnowledgeNodeVO;
import com.coding.assistant.entity.KnowledgeDocument;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.neo4j.driver.Driver;
import org.neo4j.driver.Record;
import org.neo4j.driver.Result;
import org.neo4j.driver.Session;
import org.neo4j.driver.Values;
import org.neo4j.driver.types.Node;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

@Slf4j
@Service
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class KnowledgeRetrievalService {

    private final Driver neo4jDriver;
    private final DocumentService documentService;

    /**
     * RAG 检索：向量语义检索 + Neo4j 关键词检索
     */
    public RetrievalResult retrieve(String question) {
        List<KnowledgeDocument> docs = documentService.search(question, 3);
        List<KnowledgeNodeVO> nodes = retrieveFromNeo4j(question);
        return new RetrievalResult(docs, nodes);
    }

    /**
     * 构建注入 LLM 的上下文字符串
     */
    public String buildContext(RetrievalResult result) {
        StringBuilder context = new StringBuilder();

        if (!result.documents().isEmpty()) {
            context.append("以下是从知识库中检索到的相关内容：\n\n");
            for (int i = 0; i < result.documents().size(); i++) {
                KnowledgeDocument doc = result.documents().get(i);
                context.append(String.format("【文档%d】%s\n%s\n\n", i + 1, doc.getTitle(), doc.getContent()));
            }
        }

        if (!result.nodes().isEmpty()) {
            context.append("相关知识点：");
            context.append(result.nodes().stream()
                    .map(n -> n.getName() + (n.getDescription() != null ? "（" + n.getDescription() + "）" : ""))
                    .collect(Collectors.joining("、")));
            context.append("\n");
        }

        return context.toString();
    }

    /** 兼容旧接口 */
    public String buildContext(List<KnowledgeNodeVO> nodes) {
        if (nodes == null || nodes.isEmpty()) return "";
        StringBuilder context = new StringBuilder("相关知识点：\n\n");
        for (int i = 0; i < nodes.size(); i++) {
            KnowledgeNodeVO node = nodes.get(i);
            context.append(String.format("%d. **%s** [%s]\n", i + 1, node.getName(), node.getCategory()));
            if (node.getDescription() != null && !node.getDescription().isEmpty()) {
                context.append("   ").append(node.getDescription()).append("\n");
            }
        }
        return context.toString();
    }

    private List<KnowledgeNodeVO> retrieveFromNeo4j(String question) {
        List<String> keywords = extractKeywords(question);
        if (keywords.isEmpty()) return List.of();

        List<KnowledgeNodeVO> nodes = new ArrayList<>();
        try (Session session = neo4jDriver.session()) {
            String cypher = "MATCH (n:Knowledge) " +
                    "WHERE ANY(k IN $keywords WHERE toLower(n.name) CONTAINS toLower(k) " +
                    "OR ANY(kw IN n.keywords WHERE toLower(kw) CONTAINS toLower(k))) " +
                    "RETURN n LIMIT 5";
            Result result = session.run(cypher, Values.parameters("keywords", keywords));
            while (result.hasNext()) {
                Record record = result.next();
                nodes.add(mapToVO(record.get("n").asNode()));
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            log.warn("Neo4j retrieval failed: {}", e.getMessage());
        }
        return nodes;
    }

    private List<String> extractKeywords(String question) {
        String cleaned = question.replaceAll("[^a-zA-Z0-9\\u4e00-\\u9fff\\s]", " ");
        return Arrays.stream(cleaned.split("\\s+"))
                .filter(w -> w.length() >= 2)
                .map(String::toLowerCase)
                .distinct()
                .collect(Collectors.toList());
    }

    private KnowledgeNodeVO mapToVO(Node node) {
        List<String> keywords = new ArrayList<>();
        if (node.containsKey("keywords")) {
            node.get("keywords").asList(v -> v.asString()).forEach(keywords::add);
        }
        return KnowledgeNodeVO.builder()
                .id(node.containsKey("id") ? node.get("id").asString() : String.valueOf(node.id()))
                .name(node.containsKey("name") ? node.get("name").asString() : "")
                .category(node.containsKey("category") ? node.get("category").asString() : "")
                .description(node.containsKey("description") ? node.get("description").asString() : "")
                .difficulty(node.containsKey("difficulty") ? node.get("difficulty").asString() : "")
                .keywords(keywords)
                .build();
    }

    public record RetrievalResult(List<KnowledgeDocument> documents, List<KnowledgeNodeVO> nodes) {}
}
```

```text
1	package com.coding.assistant.controller;
2	
3	import com.coding.assistant.dto.*;
4	import com.coding.assistant.security.SecurityUtil;
5	import com.coding.assistant.service.ChatService;
6	import com.coding.assistant.service.FeedbackService;
7	import com.coding.assistant.service.ProgressService;
8	import jakarta.validation.Valid;
9	import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
10	import org.springframework.http.MediaType;
11	import org.springframework.http.codec.ServerSentEvent;
12	import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
13	import reactor.core.publisher.Flux;
14	
15	import java.util.List;
16	
17	@RestController
18	@RequestMapping("/api/chat")
19	@RequiredArgsConstructor
20	public class ChatController {
21	
22	    private final ChatService chatService;
23	    private final FeedbackService feedbackService;
24	    private final ProgressService progressService;
25	
26	    @PostMapping(value = "/send", produces = MediaType.TEXT_EVENT_STREAM_VALUE)
27	    public Flux<ServerSentEvent<String>> sendMessage(@Valid @RequestBody ChatSendRequest request) {
28	        Long userId = SecurityUtil.getCurrentUserId();
29	
30	        // Record chat action
31	        progressService.recordAction(userId, "chat", null);
32	
33	        return chatService.sendMessage(userId, request)
34	                .map(content -> ServerSentEvent.<String>builder()
35	                        .data(content)
36	                        .build())
37	                .concatWith(Flux.just(ServerSentEvent.<String>builder()
38	                        .event("done")
39	                        .data("[DONE]")
40	                        .build()));
41	    }
42	
43	    @GetMapping("/conversations")
44	    public ApiResponse<List<ConversationVO>> getConversations() {
45	        Long userId = SecurityUtil.getCurrentUserId();
46	        List<ConversationVO> conversations = chatService.getConversations(userId);
47	        return ApiResponse.success(conversations);
48	    }
49	
50	    @GetMapping("/conversations/{id}/messages")
51	    public ApiResponse<List<MessageVO>> getMessages(@PathVariable Long id) {
52	        Long userId = SecurityUtil.getCurrentUserId();
53	        List<MessageVO> messages = chatService.getMessages(userId, id);
54	        return ApiResponse.success(messages);
55	    }
56	
57	    @DeleteMapping("/conversations/{id}")
58	    public ApiResponse<Void> deleteConversation(@PathVariable Long id) {
59	        Long userId = SecurityUtil.getCurrentUserId();
60	        chatService.deleteConversation(userId, id);
61	        return ApiResponse.success();
62	    }
63	
64	    @PostMapping("/feedback")
65	    public ApiResponse<Void> submitFeedback(@Valid @RequestBody FeedbackRequest request) {
66	        Long userId = SecurityUtil.getCurrentUserId();
67	        feedbackService.submit(userId, request);
68	        progressService.recordAction(userId, "feedback", String.valueOf(request.getMessageId()));
69	        return ApiResponse.success();
70	    }
71	}
```

```java
package com.coding.assistant.controller;

import com.coding.assistant.dto.ApiResponse;
import com.coding.assistant.entity.KnowledgeDocument;
import com.coding.assistant.service.DocumentService;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;

@RestController
@RequestMapping("/api/documents")
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class DocumentController {

    private final DocumentService documentService;

    @GetMapping
    public ApiResponse<List<KnowledgeDocument>> list() {
        return ApiResponse.success(documentService.listAll());
    }

    @PostMapping
    public ApiResponse<KnowledgeDocument> add(@RequestBody Map<String, String> body) {
        KnowledgeDocument doc = documentService.addDocument(
                body.get("title"),
                body.get("content"),
                body.get("category")
        );
        return ApiResponse.success(doc);
    }

    @DeleteMapping("/{id}")
    public ApiResponse<Void> delete(@PathVariable Long id) {
        documentService.deleteDocument(id);
        return ApiResponse.success();
    }
}

```

```typescript
import request from './request'

export interface KnowledgeDocument {
  id?: number
  title: string
  content: string
  category?: string
  createdAt?: string
}

export const documentApi = {
  list: () => request.get<KnowledgeDocument[]>('/documents'),
  add: (data: KnowledgeDocument) => request.post<KnowledgeDocument>('/documents', data),
  delete: (id: number) => request.delete(`/documents/${id}`),
}
```

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { ref, onMounted } from 'vue'
import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus'
import { Plus, Delete } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
import { documentApi, type KnowledgeDocument } from '@/api/document'

const docs = ref<KnowledgeDocument[]>([])
const loading = ref(false)
const submitting = ref(false)
const showDialog = ref(false)
const form = ref<KnowledgeDocument>({ title: '', content: '', category: '' })

const categories = ['java', 'spring', 'redis', 'mysql', 'vue', 'react', 'docker', 'algorithm', 'other']

async function loadDocs() {
  loading.value = true
  try {
    const res = await documentApi.list()
    docs.value = (res as any).data || []
  } finally {
    loading.value = false
  }
}

async function handleAdd() {
  if (!form.value.title || !form.value.content) {
    ElMessage.warning('标题和内容不能为空')
    return
  }
  submitting.value = true
  try {
    await documentApi.add(form.value)
    ElMessage.success('添加成功，正在生成向量索引...')
    showDialog.value = false
    form.value = { title: '', content: '', category: '' }
    await loadDocs()
  } catch {
    ElMessage.error('添加失败')
  } finally {
    submitting.value = false
  }
}

async function handleDelete(id: number) {
  await ElMessageBox.confirm('确认删除该文档？', '提示', { type: 'warning' })
  await documentApi.delete(id)
  ElMessage.success('已删除')
  await loadDocs()
}

onMounted(loadDocs)
</script>

<template>
  <div class="doc-view">
    <div class="toolbar">
      <div class="toolbar-left">
        <span class="doc-count">共 {{ docs.length }} 篇知识文档</span>
        <el-tag type="success" size="small">RAG 向量检索已启用</el-tag>
      </div>
      <el-button type="primary" :icon="Plus" @click="showDialog = true">添加文档</el-button>
    </div>

    <el-table v-loading="loading" :data="docs" stripe class="doc-table">
      <el-table-column prop="title" label="标题" min-width="200" />
      <el-table-column prop="category" label="分类" width="120">
        <template #default="{ row }">
          <el-tag v-if="row.category" size="small">{{ row.category }}</el-tag>
          <span v-else class="text-secondary">-</span>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column prop="createdAt" label="创建时间" width="180" />
      <el-table-column label="操作" width="80" align="center">
        <template #default="{ row }">
          <el-button :icon="Delete" text type="danger" size="small" @click="handleDelete(row.id)" />
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>

    <el-empty v-if="!loading && docs.length === 0" description="暂无知识文档，添加后将用于 RAG 检索增强回答质量" />

    <!-- 添加文档弹窗 -->
    <el-dialog v-model="showDialog" title="添加知识文档" width="640px" :close-on-click-modal="false">
      <el-form label-width="60px">
        <el-form-item label="标题">
          <el-input v-model="form.title" placeholder="文档标题，如：Redis缓存穿透解决方案" />
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="分类">
          <el-select v-model="form.category" placeholder="选择分类" clearable style="width: 100%">
            <el-option v-for="c in categories" :key="c" :label="c" :value="c" />
          </el-select>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="内容">
          <el-input
            v-model="form.content"
            type="textarea"
            :rows="10"
            placeholder="输入知识文档内容，支持代码和说明文字。内容越详细，RAG 检索效果越好。"
          />
        </el-form-item>
      </el-form>
      <template #footer>
        <el-button @click="showDialog = false">取消</el-button>
        <el-button type="primary" :loading="submitting" @click="handleAdd">
          {{ submitting ? '生成向量中...' : '确认添加' }}
        </el-button>
      </template>
    </el-dialog>
  </div>
</template>

<style lang="scss" scoped>
.doc-view {
  padding: 24px;
  height: 100%;
  overflow-y: auto;
}

.toolbar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.toolbar-left {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
}

.doc-count {
  font-size: 14px;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
}

.doc-table {
  width: 100%;
}

.text-secondary {
  color: var(--text-secondary);
}
</style>
```

全部完成。总结一下改动：

---

## 完成的改动

**后端（5个新文件 + 2个修改）：**

- [schema.sql](backend/src/main/resources/schema.sql) — 新增 `knowledge_document` 表
- [KnowledgeDocument.java](backend/src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/entity/KnowledgeDocument.java) — 新实体
- [KnowledgeDocumentMapper.java](backend/src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/mapper/KnowledgeDocumentMapper.java) — Mapper
- [EmbeddingService.java](backend/src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/service/EmbeddingService.java) — 调用 OpenAI embedding 接口 + 余弦相似度计算
- [DocumentService.java](backend/src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/service/DocumentService.java) — 文档管理 + 向量检索（Top-K，相似度阈值 0.5）
- [KnowledgeRetrievalService.java](backend/src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/service/KnowledgeRetrievalService.java) — 改造为向量检索 + Neo4j 双路召回
- [ChatService.java](backend/src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/service/ChatService.java) — 使用新的 `RetrievalResult`，sources 记录文档来源
- [DocumentController.java](backend/src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/controller/DocumentController.java) — 文档增删查接口

**前端（3个新/改文件）：**

- [document.ts](frontend/src/api/document.ts) — API 模块
- [KnowledgeDocView.vue](frontend/src/views/KnowledgeDoc/KnowledgeDocView.vue) — 知识文档管理页面
- [router/index.ts](frontend/src/router/index.ts) + [AppLayout.vue](frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout.vue) — 路由和菜单入口

---

## 使用方式

1. 执行 `schema.sql` 中新增的建表语句
2. 启动后进入侧边栏「知识文档」页面，添加编程知识内容
3. 添加时会自动调用 embedding 接口生成向量（需要 OpenAI/DeepSeek API 支持 `/v1/embeddings`）
4. 之后在「智能问答」提问，回答会基于你的知识库内容，底部来源显示引用的文档

> 注意：DeepSeek 不支持 embedding 接口，如果用的是 DeepSeek，需要单独配置一个支持 embedding 的 API key（如 OpenAI 或 Zhipu）。可以在 `application.yml` 里加一个 `llm.embedding.api-key` 配置项，我可以帮你加。

---

这次修改对我的使用具体有哪些变化

---

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-04-08 01:58:24Z)**_

从你作为用户的视角，变化就两个地方：

---

## 1. 多了一个「知识文档」页面

侧边栏新增入口，进去可以：
- 添加编程知识文档（标题 + 内容 + 分类）
- 删除文档
- 查看已有文档列表

添加文档时后台会自动调用 embedding 接口把内容向量化存起来。

---

## 2. 智能问答的回答质量变了

**之前**：你问问题，系统只是把"Spring Boot""Redis"这些关键词名称塞给 AI，AI 完全靠自己的训练数据回答。

**现在**：你问问题，系统会先去知识文档库里找语义最相关的内容，把原文注入给 AI，AI 基于你的文档内容来回答。

---

## 实际效果对比

假设你在知识文档里添加了一篇：
> 标题：Redis缓存穿透解决方案
> 内容：缓存穿透是指查询一个不存在的key，导致每次请求都打到数据库...解决方案：1. 布隆过滤器 2. 缓存空值...

然后你问：**"缓存穿透怎么处理？"**

- 之前：AI 靠自己知识回答，内容可能泛泛
- 现在：AI 会说"根据知识库内容：缓存穿透是指..."，回答直接基于你写的文档，更准确，底部来源也会显示引用了哪篇文档

---

## 前提条件

这个功能需要你的 LLM API 支持 `/v1/embeddings` 接口。你现在用的是 DeepSeek，**DeepSeek 不支持 embedding**，所以添加文档时向量化会失败，RAG 检索不会生效。

需要解决这个问题才能真正用起来，你有以下选择：
1. 用 OpenAI 的 API key（支持 `text-embedding-ada-002`）
2. 用智谱 AI 的 API（支持 embedding，国内可用）
3. 我帮你改成用本地 embedding 模型（不需要额外 API）

---

- **不想装新软件** - 不想额外安装软件，用纯 Java 方案

**你的电脑有独立显卡吗？**

Options:
- **有独立显卡** - 有 NVIDIA/AMD 独立显卡，embedding 速度快
- **只有 CPU** - 没有独立显卡，纯 CPU 运行，速度稍慢但完全可用

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-04-08 02:00:54Z)**_

好，用纯 Java 方案：**DJL（Deep Java Library）+ 本地 ONNX 模型**，不需要安装任何额外软件，模型文件自动下载到本地缓存。

用的模型是 `all-MiniLM-L6-v2`，只有 **90MB**，CPU 上每次 embedding 约 50-100ms，完全够用。

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-04-08 02:01:12Z)**_

DJL 的依赖比较重，而且 ONNX 运行时在 Windows CPU 上配置容易出问题。换一个更简单的方案：

**直接用 Java 调用 HuggingFace 的 `sentence-transformers` HTTP 服务** — 不对，你不想装软件。

最轻量的纯 Java 方案：用 **Deep Java Library (DJL) 的 sentence-transformers 引擎**，但依赖包大。

实际上最简单可靠的方案是：**用 TF-IDF + BM25 做本地向量化**，完全不依赖任何外部库，效果比关键词匹配好很多，虽然不如神经网络 embedding，但对编程问答场景已经足够，而且：
- 零依赖
- 零延迟
- 零配置

还有一个折中方案：**调用智谱 AI 的 embedding 接口**（免费额度很大，国内速度快，不需要额外安装软件）。

你倾向哪个？

<tool-use data-tool-type="generic" data-tool-name="AskUserQuestion"><details>

**选择哪种方案？**

Options:
- **本地 TF-IDF（推荐）** - TF-IDF 算法，纯 Java 实现，零依赖、零延迟、零配置。效果比关键词匹配好，对编程问答场景够用
- **智谱 AI Embedding API** - 智谱 AI 提供 embedding 接口，免费额度大，国内速度快，效果最好，需要注册智谱账号拿 API key
- **DJL 本地神经网络模型** - 安装 DJL + ONNX 运行时，下载 90MB 模型，效果最好但配置最复杂


**Answer:** 本地 TF-IDF（推荐）

```text
1	package com.coding.assistant.service;
2	
3	import com.coding.assistant.config.LlmConfig;
4	import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode;
5	import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;
6	import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode;
7	import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
8	import org.springframework.http.MediaType;
9	import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
10	import org.springframework.web.reactive.function.client.WebClient;
11	
12	import java.util.ArrayList;
13	import java.util.List;
14	
15	@Slf4j
16	@Service
17	public class EmbeddingService {
18	
19	    private final WebClient webClient;
20	    private final ObjectMapper objectMapper;
21	    private static final String EMBEDDING_MODEL = "text-embedding-ada-002";
22	
23	    public EmbeddingService(LlmConfig llmConfig, ObjectMapper objectMapper) {
24	        this.objectMapper = objectMapper;
25	        LlmConfig.ProviderConfig config = llmConfig.getOpenai();
26	        this.webClient = WebClient.builder()
27	                .baseUrl(config.getBaseUrl())
28	                .defaultHeader("Authorization", "Bearer " + config.getApiKey())
29	                .defaultHeader("Content-Type", "application/json")
30	                .codecs(c -> c.defaultCodecs().maxInMemorySize(10 * 1024 * 1024))
31	                .build();
32	    }
33	
34	    /**
35	     * 调用 embedding 接口，返回向量列表
36	     */
37	    public List<Double> embed(String text) {
38	        try {
39	            ObjectNode body = objectMapper.createObjectNode();
40	            body.put("model", EMBEDDING_MODEL);
41	            body.put("input", text);
42	
43	            String response = webClient.post()
44	                    .uri("/v1/embeddings")
45	                    .contentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON)
46	                    .bodyValue(body.toString())
47	                    .retrieve()
48	                    .bodyToMono(String.class)
49	                    .block();
50	
51	            JsonNode node = objectMapper.readTree(response);
52	            JsonNode embeddingArray = node.path("data").path(0).path("embedding");
53	
54	            List<Double> vector = new ArrayList<>();
55	            for (JsonNode val : embeddingArray) {
56	                vector.add(val.asDouble());
57	            }
58	            return vector;
59	        } catch (Exception e) {
60	            log.error("Embedding failed: {}", e.getMessage());
61	            return List.of();
62	        }
63	    }
64	
65	    /**
66	     * 计算两个向量的余弦相似度
67	     */
68	    public double cosineSimilarity(List<Double> a, List<Double> b) {
69	        if (a.isEmpty() || b.isEmpty() || a.size() != b.size()) return 0.0;
70	        double dot = 0, normA = 0, normB = 0;
71	        for (int i = 0; i < a.size(); i++) {
72	            dot += a.get(i) * b.get(i);
73	            normA += a.get(i) * a.get(i);
74	            normB += b.get(i) * b.get(i);
75	        }
76	        return (normA == 0 || normB == 0) ? 0.0 : dot / (Math.sqrt(normA) * Math.sqrt(normB));
77	    }
78	}
79
```

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-04-08 02:02:46Z)**_

TF-IDF 的核心思路：
- `embed(text)` 返回一个稀疏向量，每个维度对应词表中的一个词，值是该词的 TF-IDF 权重
- 词表在第一次调用时从已有文档动态构建，之后增量更新
- `cosineSimilarity` 不变，直接复用

但有个问题：TF-IDF 需要"语料库"来计算 IDF（词在多少文档中出现），而查询时文档库可能还没建立。解决方案是用**内置的编程领域词表**做 IDF 权重，不依赖运行时语料。

实际上更简单的做法：直接用 **词袋模型（Bag of Words）+ 余弦相似度**，对编程问答场景效果已经很好，实现极简：

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-04-08 02:03:03Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```java
package com.coding.assistant.service;

import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;

import java.util.*;
import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap;
import java.util.regex.Pattern;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

/**
 * 本地 TF-IDF 向量化服务，无需外部 API 或模型文件。
 * 词表在运行时从文档语料动态构建，首次启动为空时使用内置编程领域词表兜底。
 */
@Slf4j
@Service
public class EmbeddingService {

    // 运行时词表：词 -> 索引
    private final Map<String, Integer> vocab = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
    // 文档频率：词 -> 出现该词的文档数
    private final Map<String, Integer> docFreq = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
    private int totalDocs = 0;

    private static final Pattern TOKEN_PATTERN = Pattern.compile("[a-zA-Z\\u4e00-\\u9fff]+");

    // 内置编程领域词表（冷启动兜底）
    private static final List<String> BUILTIN_TERMS = List.of(
        "spring", "boot", "redis", "mysql", "java", "python", "vue", "react",
        "docker", "kubernetes", "api", "rest", "http", "json", "xml", "sql",
        "index", "cache", "session", "token", "jwt", "oauth", "security",
        "thread", "async", "sync", "queue", "stack", "list", "map", "set",
        "class", "interface", "abstract", "extends", "implements", "override",
        "mybatis", "hibernate", "jpa", "orm", "transaction", "rollback",
        "nginx", "tomcat", "maven", "gradle", "git", "ci", "cd", "deploy",
        "algorithm", "sort", "search", "tree", "graph", "hash", "binary",
        "exception", "error", "debug", "log", "test", "mock", "assert",
        "缓存", "穿透", "雪崩", "击穿", "索引", "事务", "锁", "并发", "线程",
        "接口", "实现", "继承", "多态", "封装", "注解", "反射", "泛型",
        "分页", "查询", "插入", "更新", "删除", "连接", "聚合", "分组"
    );

    public EmbeddingService() {
        // 初始化内置词表
        for (String term : BUILTIN_TERMS) {
            vocab.putIfAbsent(term, vocab.size());
            docFreq.put(term, 1);
        }
        totalDocs = 1;
    }

    /**
     * 将文本转为 TF-IDF 向量
     */
    public List<Double> embed(String text) {
        List<String> tokens = tokenize(text);
        if (tokens.isEmpty()) return List.of();

        // 统计词频
        Map<String, Long> tf = tokens.stream()
                .collect(Collectors.groupingBy(t -> t, Collectors.counting()));

        // 确保所有词都在词表中
        tf.keySet().forEach(w -> vocab.putIfAbsent(w, vocab.size()));

        int size = vocab.size();
        double[] vector = new double[size];

        for (Map.Entry<String, Long> entry : tf.entrySet()) {
            Integer idx = vocab.get(entry.getKey());
            if (idx != null && idx < size) {
                double tfVal = (double) entry.getValue() / tokens.size();
                int df = docFreq.getOrDefault(entry.getKey(), 1);
                double idf = Math.log((double) (totalDocs + 1) / (df + 1)) + 1.0;
                vector[idx] = tfVal * idf;
            }
        }

        // 转为 List<Double>
        List<Double> result = new ArrayList<>(size);
        for (double v : vector) result.add(v);
        return result;
    }

    /**
     * 新文档入库时更新 IDF 统计（由 DocumentService 调用）
     */
    public void updateCorpus(String text) {
        List<String> tokens = tokenize(text);
        Set<String> uniqueTokens = new HashSet<>(tokens);
        uniqueTokens.forEach(w -> docFreq.merge(w, 1, Integer::sum));
        totalDocs++;
    }

    /**
     * 余弦相似度（自动对齐向量长度）
     */
    public double cosineSimilarity(List<Double> a, List<Double> b) {
        int size = Math.max(a.size(), b.size());
        double dot = 0, normA = 0, normB = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
            double ai = i < a.size() ? a.get(i) : 0.0;
            double bi = i < b.size() ? b.get(i) : 0.0;
            dot += ai * bi;
            normA += ai * ai;
            normB += bi * bi;
        }
        return (normA == 0 || normB == 0) ? 0.0 : dot / (Math.sqrt(normA) * Math.sqrt(normB));
    }

    private List<String> tokenize(String text) {
        List<String> tokens = new ArrayList<>();
        var matcher = TOKEN_PATTERN.matcher(text.toLowerCase());
        while (matcher.find()) {
            String token = matcher.group();
            if (token.length() >= 2) tokens.add(token);
        }
        return tokens;
    }
}

```

```text
7	import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;
8	import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
9	import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
10	import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;

12	import java.time.LocalDateTime;
13	import java.util.Comparator;
14	import java.util.List;
15	import java.util.stream.Collectors;

17	@Slf4j
18	@Service
19	@RequiredArgsConstructor
20	public class DocumentService {
21	
22	    private final KnowledgeDocumentMapper documentMapper;
23	    private final EmbeddingService embeddingService;
24	    private final ObjectMapper objectMapper;
25	
26	    /**
27	     * 新增文档并自动生成 embedding
28	     */
29	    public KnowledgeDocument addDocument(String title, String content, String category) {
30	        KnowledgeDocument doc = KnowledgeDocument.builder()
31	                .title(title)
32	                .content(content)
33	                .category(category)
34	                .createdAt(LocalDateTime.now())
35	                .build();
36	
37	        // 用 title + content 拼接后向量化
38	        List<Double> vector = embeddingService.embed(title + "\n" + content);
39	        if (!vector.isEmpty()) {
40	            try {
41	                doc.setEmbedding(objectMapper.writeValueAsString(vector));
42	            } catch (Exception e) {
43	                log.error("Failed to serialize embedding: {}", e.getMessage());
44	            }
45	        }
46	
47	        documentMapper.insert(doc);
48	        return doc;
49	    }
50	
51	    /**
52	     * 向量语义检索，返回 Top-K 最相关文档
53	     */
54	    public List<KnowledgeDocument> search(String query, int topK) {
55	        List<Double> queryVector = embeddingService.embed(query);
56	        if (queryVector.isEmpty()) {
57	            return List.of();
58	        }
59	
60	        List<KnowledgeDocument> docs = documentMapper.selectAllWithEmbedding();
61	
62	        return docs.stream()
63	                .map(doc -> {
64	                    double score = 0.0;
65	                    try {
66	                        List<Double> docVector = objectMapper.readValue(
67	                                doc.getEmbedding(), new TypeReference<List<Double>>() {});
68	                        score = embeddingService.cosineSimilarity(queryVector, docVector);
69	                    } catch (Exception e) {
70	                        log.warn("Failed to parse embedding for doc {}: {}", doc.getId(), e.getMessage());
71	                    }
72	                    doc.setEmbedding(String.valueOf(score)); // 临时借用字段传分数
73	                    return doc;
74	                })
75	                .filter(doc -> Double.parseDouble(doc.getEmbedding()) > 0.5) // 相似度阈值
76	                .sorted(Comparator.comparingDouble(d -> -Double.parseDouble(d.getEmbedding())))
77	                .limit(topK)
78	                .peek(doc -> doc.setEmbedding(null)) // 清除分数，不返回给调用方
79	                .collect(Collectors.toList());
80	    }
81	
82	    public List<KnowledgeDocument> listAll() {
83	        return documentMapper.selectList(
84	                new LambdaQueryWrapper<KnowledgeDocument>().select(
85	                        KnowledgeDocument::getId,
86	                        KnowledgeDocument::getTitle,
87	                        KnowledgeDocument::getCategory,
88	                        KnowledgeDocument::getCreatedAt
89	                )
90	        );
91	    }
92	
93	    public void deleteDocument(Long id) {
94	        documentMapper.deleteById(id);
95	    }
96	}
```

TF-IDF 有个问题：存入数据库的向量维度是固定的（存入时词表大小），但查询时词表可能已经扩大，导致维度不匹配。需要在启动时先加载所有文档语料来初始化词表，然后再做检索。

```text
89	                    } catch (Exception e) {
90	                        log.warn("Failed to parse embedding for doc {}: {}", doc.getId(), e.getMessage());
91	                    }
92	                    doc.setEmbedding(String.valueOf(score)); // 临时借用字段传分数
93	                    return doc;
94	                })
95	                .filter(doc -> Double.parseDouble(doc.getEmbedding()) > 0.1) // TF-IDF 相似度阈值
96	                .sorted(Comparator.comparingDouble(d -> -Double.parseDouble(d.getEmbedding())))
97	                .limit(topK)
98	                .peek(doc -> doc.setEmbedding(null)) // 清除分数，不返回给调用方
99	                .collect(Collectors.toList());
100	    }
101	
102	    public List<KnowledgeDocument> listAll() {
103	        return documentMapper.selectList(
104	                new LambdaQueryWrapper<KnowledgeDocument>().select(
105	                        KnowledgeDocument::getId,
106	                        KnowledgeDocument::getTitle,
107	                        KnowledgeDocument::getCategory,
108	                        KnowledgeDocument::getCreatedAt
109	                )
110	        );
111	    }
112	
113	    public void deleteDocument(Long id) {
114	        documentMapper.deleteById(id);
115	    }
116	}
117
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-04-08 02:05:07Z)**_

完成。总结这次改动：

---

## 改动内容

只改了 [EmbeddingService.java](backend/src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/service/EmbeddingService.java) 和 [DocumentService.java](backend/src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/service/DocumentService.java)，其他文件不变。

**EmbeddingService** 从"调用 OpenAI API"改为"本地 TF-IDF 计算"：
- 内置 60+ 个编程领域词汇作为初始词表（冷启动兜底）
- 每次添加文档时动态扩充词表，IDF 权重随语料增长越来越准
- 零网络请求，零延迟，零费用

**DocumentService** 新增 `@PostConstruct`：
- 服务启动时自动加载数据库里已有的文档来初始化词表
- 保证重启后词表不丢失

---

## 注意事项

TF-IDF 向量维度会随词表增长而变化。**已存入数据库的旧向量维度比新向量小**，会导致相似度计算偏低。`cosineSimilarity` 已处理了维度不对齐的情况（短的补 0），不会报错，但精度会稍差。

如果你之前已经添加过文档，建议删掉重新添加一遍，让向量用最新词表重新生成。

---

```text
1	package com.coding.assistant.security;
2	
3	import jakarta.servlet.FilterChain;
4	import jakarta.servlet.ServletException;
5	import jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;
6	import jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
7	import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
8	import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
9	import org.springframework.security.authentication.UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken;
10	import org.springframework.security.core.context.SecurityContextHolder;
11	import org.springframework.security.web.authentication.WebAuthenticationDetailsSource;
12	import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
13	import org.springframework.util.StringUtils;
14	import org.springframework.web.filter.OncePerRequestFilter;
15	
16	import java.io.IOException;
17	import java.util.Collections;
18	
19	@Slf4j
20	@Component
21	@RequiredArgsConstructor
22	public class JwtAuthenticationFilter extends OncePerRequestFilter {
23	
24	    private final JwtUtil jwtUtil;
25	
26	    @Override
27	    protected void doFilterInternal(HttpServletRequest request,
28	                                    HttpServletResponse response,
29	                                    FilterChain filterChain) throws ServletException, IOException {
30	        try {
31	            String token = extractTokenFromRequest(request);
32	
33	            if (StringUtils.hasText(token) && jwtUtil.validateToken(token)) {
34	                Long userId = jwtUtil.getUserIdFromToken(token);
35	                String username = jwtUtil.getUsernameFromToken(token);
36	
37	                JwtUserDetails userDetails = new JwtUserDetails(userId, username);
38	
39	                UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken authentication =
40	                        new UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken(userDetails, null, Collections.emptyList());
41	                authentication.setDetails(new WebAuthenticationDetailsSource().buildDetails(request));
42	
43	                SecurityContextHolder.getContext().setAuthentication(authentication);
44	            }
45	        } catch (Exception e) {
46	            log.error("Cannot set user authentication: {}", e.getMessage());
47	        }
48	
49	        filterChain.doFilter(request, response);
50	    }
51	
52	    private String extractTokenFromRequest(HttpServletRequest request) {
53	        String bearerToken = request.getHeader("Authorization");
54	        if (StringUtils.hasText(bearerToken) && bearerToken.startsWith("Bearer ")) {
55	            return bearerToken.substring(7);
56	        }
57	        return null;
58	    }
59	
60	    @Override
61	    protected boolean shouldNotFilter(HttpServletRequest request) {
62	        String path = request.getRequestURI();
63	        return path.startsWith("/api/auth/register") || path.startsWith("/api/auth/login");
64	    }
65	}
```

## 1. Dijkstra绠楁硶锛堥€傜敤浜庨潪璐熸潈鍥撅級

```python
import heapq

def dijkstra(graph, start):
    """
    Dijkstra绠楁硶姹傚崟婧愭渶鐭矾寰?    graph: 閭绘帴琛ㄨ〃绀虹殑鍥撅紝鏍煎紡涓?{鑺傜偣: [(閭诲眳鑺傜偣, 鏉冮噸), ...]}
    start: 璧峰鑺傜偣
    """
    # 鍒濆鍖栬窛绂诲瓧鍏革紝鎵€鏈夎妭鐐硅窛绂昏涓烘棤绌峰ぇ
    distances = {node: float('inf') for node in graph}
    distances[start] = 0

    # 浼樺厛闃熷垪锛屽瓨鍌?璺濈, 鑺傜偣)
    priority_queue = [(0, start)]

    # 璁板綍鍓嶉┍鑺傜偣锛岀敤浜庨噸寤鸿矾寰?    previous_nodes = {node: None for node in graph}

    while priority_queue:
        current_distance, current_node = heapq.heappop(priority_queue)

        # 濡傛灉褰撳墠璺濈澶т簬宸茶褰曠殑璺濈锛岃烦杩?        if current_distance > distances[current_node]:
            continue

        # 閬嶅巻閭诲眳鑺傜偣
        for neighbor, weight in graph.get(current_node, []):
            distance = current_distance + weight

            # 濡傛灉鎵惧埌鏇寸煭鐨勮矾寰?            if distance < distances[neighbor]:
                distances[neighbor] = distance
                previous_nodes[neighbor] = current_node
                heapq.heappush(priority_queue, (distance, neighbor))

    return distances, previous_nodes

def get_shortest_path(previous_nodes, start, target):
    """鏍规嵁鍓嶉┍鑺傜偣閲嶅缓鏈€鐭矾寰?""
    path = []
    current = target

    while current is not None:
        path.append(current)
        current = previous_nodes[current]

    path.reverse()

    if path[0] == start:
        return path
    else:
        return []  # 娌℃湁璺緞

# 浣跨敤绀轰緥
if __name__ == "__main__":
    # 鍒涘缓绀轰緥鍥?    graph = {
        'A': [('B', 1), ('C', 4)],
        'B': [('C', 2), ('D', 5)],
        'C': [('D', 1)],
        'D': []
    }

    start_node = 'A'
    distances, previous_nodes = dijkstra(graph, start_node)

    print(f"浠庤妭鐐?{start_node} 鍒板悇鑺傜偣鐨勬渶鐭窛绂?")
    for node, dist in distances.items():
        print(f"  {node}: {dist}")

    # 鑾峰彇鍒扮壒瀹氳妭鐐圭殑璺緞
    target = 'D'
    path = get_shortest_path(previous_nodes, start_node, target)
    print(f"\n浠?{start_node} 鍒?{target} 鐨勬渶鐭矾寰? {' -> '.join(path)}")
```

## 2. Bellman-Ford绠楁硶锛堥€傜敤浜庢湁璐熸潈杈逛絾鏃犺礋鏉冪幆鐨勫浘锛?
```python
def bellman_ford(graph, start):
    """
    Bellman-Ford绠楁硶姹傚崟婧愭渶鐭矾寰?    鍙互澶勭悊璐熸潈杈癸紝浣嗕笉鑳芥湁璐熸潈鐜?    graph: 杈瑰垪琛紝鏍煎 紡涓?[(璧风偣, 缁堢偣, 鏉冮噸), ...]
    start: 璧峰鑺傜偣
    """
    # 鑾峰彇鎵€鏈夎妭鐐?    nodes = set()
    for u, v, w in graph:
        nodes.add(u)
        nodes.add(v)

    # 鍒濆鍖栬窛绂?    distances = {node: float('inf') for node in nodes}
    distances[start] = 0

    # 璁板綍鍓嶉┍鑺傜偣
    previous_nodes = {node: None for node in nodes}

    # 鏉惧紱鎿嶄綔锛岃繘琛孷-1娆?    for _ in range(len(nodes) - 1):
        updated = False
        for u, v, w in graph:
            if distances[u] != float('inf') and distances[u] + w < distances[v]:
                distances[v] = distances[u] + w
                previous_nodes[v] = u
                updated = True

        # 濡傛灉娌℃湁鏇存柊锛屾彁鍓嶇粨鏉?        if not updated:
            break

    # 妫€鏌ヨ礋鏉冪幆
    for u, v, w in graph:
        if distances[u] != float('inf') and distances[u] + w < distances[v]:
            raise ValueError("鍥句腑瀛樺湪璐熸潈鐜?)

    return distances, previous_nodes

# 浣跨敤绀轰緥
if __name__ == "__main__":
    # 鍒涘缓绀轰緥鍥撅紙杈瑰垪琛ㄥ舰寮忥級
    edges = [
        ('A', 'B', 1),
        ('A', 'C', 4),
        ('B', 'C', 2),
        ('B', 'D', 5),
        ('C', 'D', 1)
    ]

    start_node = 'A'
    distances, previous_nodes = bellman_ford(edges, start_node)

    print(f"浠庤妭鐐?{start_node} 鍒板悇鑺傜偣鐨勬渶鐭窛绂?")
    for node, dist in distances.items():
        print(f"  {node}: {dist}")
```

## 3. SPFA绠楁硶锛圔ellman-Ford鐨勯槦鍒椾紭鍖栫増锛?
```python
from collections import deque

def spfa(graph, start):
    """
    SPFA绠楁硶锛圫hortest Path Faster Algorithm锛?    Bellman-Ford鐨勯槦鍒椾紭鍖栫増鏈?    graph: 閭绘帴琛ㄨ〃绀虹殑鍥?    start: 璧峰鑺傜偣
    """
    # 鍒濆鍖栬窛绂?    distances = {node: float('inf') for node in graph}
    distances[start] = 0

    # 璁板綍鑺傜偣鏄惁鍦ㄩ槦鍒椾腑
    in_queue = {node: False for node in graph}
    in_queue[start] = True

    # 闃熷垪
    queue = deque([start])

    # 璁板綍鍓嶉┍鑺傜偣
    previous_nodes = {node: None for node in graph}

    # 璁板綍鑺傜偣鍏ラ槦娆℃暟锛岀敤浜庢娴嬭礋鐜?    count = {node: 0 for node in graph}
    count[start] = 1

    while queue:
        current_node = queue.popleft()
        in_queue[current_node] = False

        # 閬嶅巻閭诲眳
        for neighbor, weight in graph.get(current_node, []):
            new_distance = distances[current_node] + weight

            if new_distance < distances[neighbor]:
                distances[neighbor] = new_distance
                previous_nodes[neighbor] = current_node

                if not in_queue[neighbor]:
                    queue.append(neighbor)
                    in_queue[neighbor] = True
                    count[neighbor] += 1

                    # 濡傛灉鍏ラ槦娆℃暟瓒呰繃鑺傜偣鏁帮紝鍙兘瀛樺湪璐熺幆
                    if count[neighbor] > len(graph):
                        raise ValueError("鍥句腑鍙兘瀛樺湪璐熸潈鐜?)

    return distances, previous_nodes

# 浣跨敤绀轰緥
if __name__ == "__main__":
    graph = {
        'A': [('B', 1), ('C', 4)],
        'B': [('C', 2), ('D', 5)],
        'C': [('D', 1)],
        'D': []
    }

    start_node = 'A'
    distances, previous_nodes = spfa(graph, start_node)

    print(f"浠庤妭鐐?{start_node} 鍒板悇鑺傜偣鐨勬渶鐭窛绂?")
    for node, dist in distances.items():
        print(f"  {node}: {dist}")
```

2. **Bellman-Ford绠楁硶**锛氬彲浠ュ鐞嗚礋鏉冭竟锛屾椂闂村鏉傚害 O(VE)锛岄€傜敤浜庤竟鏁颁笉澶氭垨闇€瑕佹娴嬭礋鐜 殑鎯呭喌

## 1. Dijkstra绠楁硶锛堥€傜敤浜庨潪璐熸潈鍥撅級

```python
import heapq

def dijkstra(graph, start):
    """
    Dijkstra绠楁硶 - 閫傜敤浜庨潪璐熸潈閲嶇殑鍥?    graph: 閭绘帴琛ㄨ〃绀虹殑鍥撅紝鏍煎紡涓?{鑺傜偣: [(閭诲眳鑺傜偣, 鏉 冮噸), ...]}
    start: 璧峰鑺傜偣
    杩斿洖: 浠庤捣濮嬭妭鐐瑰埌鎵€鏈夎妭鐐圭殑鏈€鐭窛绂?    """
    # 鍒濆鍖栬窛绂诲瓧鍏革紝鎵€鏈夎妭鐐硅窛绂讳负鏃犵┓澶?    distances = {node: float('inf') for node in graph}
    distances[start] = 0

    # 浼樺厛闃熷垪 (璺濈, 鑺傜偣)
    priority_queue = [(0, start)]

    while priority_queue:
        current_distance, current_node = heapq.heappop(priority_queue)

        # 濡傛灉褰撳墠璺濈澶т簬宸茶褰曠殑璺濈锛岃烦杩?        if current_distance > distances[current_node]:
            continue

        # 閬嶅巻閭诲眳鑺傜偣
        for neighbor, weight in graph.get(current_node, []):
            distance = current_distance + weight

            # 濡傛灉鎵惧埌鏇寸煭鐨勮矾寰勶紝鏇存柊璺濈
            if distance < distances[neighbor]:
                distances[neighbor] = distance
                heapq.heappush(priority_queue, (distance, neighbor))

    return distances

# 绀轰緥鐢ㄦ硶
if __name__ == "__main__":
    # 鍒涘缓绀轰緥鍥撅紙閭绘帴琛級
    graph = {
        'A': [('B', 4), ('C', 2)],
        'B': [('C', 1), ('D', 5)],
        'C': [('D', 8), ('E', 10)],
        'D': [('E', 2)],
        'E': []
    }

    start_node = 'A'
    distances = dijkstra(graph, start_node)

    print(f"浠庤妭鐐?{start_node} 鍒板悇鑺傜偣鐨勬渶鐭窛绂?")
    for node, dist in distances.items():
        print(f"  {start_node} -> {node}: {dist}")
```

## 2. Bellman-Ford绠楁硶锛堥€傜敤浜庢湁璐熸潈杈癸紝鑳芥娴嬭礋鏉冪幆锛?
```python
def bellman_ford(graph, start, num_vertices):
    """
    Bellman-Ford绠楁硶 - 閫傜敤浜庢湁璐熸潈閲嶇殑鍥撅紝鑳芥娴嬭礋鏉冪幆
    graph: 杈瑰垪琛紝鏍煎紡涓?[(璧风偣, 缁堢偣, 鏉冮噸), ...]
    start: 璧峰鑺傜偣
    num_vertices: 鑺傜偣鎬绘暟
    杩斿洖: (璺濈鍒楄〃, 鏄惁瀛樺湪璐熸潈鐜?
    """
    # 鍒濆鍖栬窛绂?    distances = [float('inf')] * num_vertices
    distances[start] = 0

    # 鏉惧紱鎿嶄綔 V-1 娆?    for _ in range(num_vertices - 1):
        updated = False
        for u, v, w in graph:
            if distances[u] != float('inf') and distances[u] + w < distances[v]:
                distances[v] = distances[u] + w
                updated = True

        # 濡傛灉娌℃湁鏇存柊锛屾彁鍓嶇粨鏉?        if not updated:
            break

    # 妫€鏌ヨ礋鏉冪幆
    has_negative_cycle = False
    for u, v, w in graph:
        if distances[u] != float('inf') and distances[u] + w < distances[v]:
            has_negative_cycle = True
            break

    return distances, has_negative_cycle

# 绀轰緥鐢ㄦ硶
if __name__ == "__main__":
    # 鍒涘缓绀轰緥鍥撅紙杈瑰垪琛級
    edges = [
        (0, 1, 4),  # 0->1 鏉冮噸4
        (0, 2, 2),  # 0->2 鏉冮噸2
        (1, 2, 1),  # 1->2 鏉冮噸1
        (1, 3, 5),  # 1->3 鏉冮噸5
        (2, 3, 8),  # 2->3 鏉冮噸8
        (2, 4, 10), # 2->4 鏉冮噸10
        (3, 4, 2)   # 3->4 鏉冮噸2
    ]

    start_node = 0
    num_vertices = 5
    distances, has_negative_cycle = bellman_ford(edges, start_node, num_vertices)

    if has_negative_cycle:
        print("鍥句腑瀛樺湪璐熸潈鐜紒")
    else:
        print(f"浠庤妭鐐?{start_node} 鍒板悇鑺傜偣鐨勬渶鐭窛绂?")
        for i, dist in enumerate(distances):
            print(f"  {start_node} -> {i}: {dist}")
```

## 3. SPFA绠楁硶锛圔ellman-Ford鐨勯槦鍒椾紭鍖栫増锛?
```python
from collections import deque

def spfa(graph, start):
    """
    SPFA绠楁硶 - Bellman-Ford鐨勯槦鍒椾紭鍖栫増鏈?    graph: 閭绘帴琛ㄨ〃绀虹殑鍥?    start: 璧峰鑺傜偣
    杩斿洖: (璺濈瀛楀吀, 鏄惁瀛樺湪璐熸潈鐜?
    """
    distances = {node: float('inf') for node in graph}
    distances[start] = 0

    # 璁板綍鑺傜偣鍏ラ槦娆℃暟
    count = {node: 0 for node in graph}

    # 璁板綍鑺傜偣鏄惁鍦ㄩ槦鍒椾腑
    in_queue = {node: False for node in graph}

    queue = deque([start])
    in_queue[start] = True
    count[start] += 1

    while queue:
        current_node = queue.popleft()
        in_queue[current_node] = False

        for neighbor, weight in graph.get(current_node, []):
            if distances[current_node] + weight < distances[neighbor]:
                distances[neighbor] = distances[current_node] + weight

                if not in_queue[neighbor]:
                    queue.append(neighbor)
                    in_queue[neighbor] = True
                    count[neighbor] += 1

                    # 濡傛灉鑺傜偣鍏ラ槦娆℃暟瓒呰繃鑺傜偣鏁帮紝瀛樺湪璐熸潈鐜?                    if count[neighbor] > len(graph):
                        return distances, True

    return distances, False

# 绀轰緥鐢ㄦ硶
if __name__ == "__main__":
    # 鍒涘缓绀轰緥鍥撅紙閭绘帴琛級
    graph = {
        0: [(1, 4), (2, 2)],
        1: [(2, 1), (3, 5)],
        2: [(3, 8), (4, 10)],
        3: [(4, 2)],
        4: []
    }

    start_node = 0
    distances, has_negative_cycle = spfa(graph, start_node)

    if has_negative_cycle:
        print("鍥句腑瀛樺湪璐熸潈鐜紒")
    else:
        print(f"浠庤妭鐐?{start_node} 鍒板悇鑺傜偣鐨勬渶鐭窛绂?")
        for node, dist in distances.items():
            print(f"  {start_node} -> {node}: {dist}")
```

## 4. 甯﹁矾寰勮褰曠殑鏈€鐭矾寰勭畻娉?
```python
import heapq

def dijkstra_with_path(graph, start, end):
    """
    Dijkstra绠楁硶锛屽悓鏃惰褰曟渶鐭矾寰?    """
    distances = {node: float('inf') for node in graph}
    distances[start] = 0
    previous_nodes = {node: None for node in graph}

    priority_queue = [(0, start)]

    while priority_queue:
        current_distance, current_node = heapq.heappop(priority_queue)

        if current_distance > distances[current_node]:
            continue

        # 濡傛灉鎵惧埌鐩爣鑺傜偣锛屽彲浠ユ彁鍓嶇粨鏉?        if current_node == end:
            break

        for neighbor, weight in graph.get(current_node, []):
            distance = current_distance + weight

            if distance < distances[neighbor]:
                distances[neighbor] = distance
                previous_nodes[neighbor] = current_node
                heapq.heappush(priority_queue, (distance, neighbor))

    # 閲嶅缓璺緞
    path = []
    current = end
    while current is not None:
        path.append(current)
        current = previous_nodes[current]
    path.reverse()

    return distances[end], path

# 绀轰緥鐢ㄦ硶
if __name__ == "__main__":
    graph = {
        'A': [('B', 4), ('C', 2)],
        'B': [('C', 1), ('D', 5)],
        'C': [('D', 8), ('E', 10)],
        'D': [('E', 2)],
        'E': []
    }

    start = 'A'
    end = 'E'
    distance, path = dijkstra_with_path(graph, start, end)

    print(f"浠?{start} 鍒?{end} 鐨勬渶鐭矾寰?")
    print(f"  璺濈: {distance}")
    print(f"  璺緞: {' -> '.join(path)}")
```

## 绠楁硶閫夋嫨寤鸿锛?
1. **Dijkstra绠楁硶**锛氭渶甯哥敤锛屾椂闂村鏉傚害 O((V+E)logV)锛岄€傜敤浜?*闈炶礋鏉冨浘**
2. **Bellman-Ford绠楁硶**锛氭椂闂村鏉傚害 O(VE)锛岄€傜敤浜?*鏈夎礋鏉冭竟**鐨勫浘锛岃兘妫€娴嬭礋鏉冪幆
3. **SPFA绠楁硶**锛欱ellman-Ford鐨勪紭鍖栫増锛屽钩鍧囨椂闂村鏉傚害 O(kE)锛宬閫氬父涓哄父鏁?
鏍规嵁浣犵殑鍏蜂綋闇€姹傞€夋嫨鍚堥€傜殑绠楁硶銆傚鏋滀綘闇€瑕佹洿鍏蜂綋鐨勫疄鐜版垨鏈夌壒娈婅姹傦紝璇峰憡璇夋垜锛?String), 2026-04-08T09:24:48.804427100(LocalDateTime)

2026-04-08T09:32:54.807+08:00 DEBUG 18272 --- [nio-8080-exec-4] c.c.a.mapper.CodeSnippetMapper.insert    : ==> Parameters: 4(Long), 鍗曟簮鏈€鐭矾寰?String), import heapq

def dijkstra(graph, start):
    """
    Dijkstra绠楁硶姹傚崟婧愭渶鐭矾寰?
    graph: 閭绘帴琛ㄨ〃绀虹殑鍥撅紝鏍煎紡涓?{鑺傜偣: [(閭诲眳鑺傜偣, 鏉冮噸), ...]}
    start: 璧峰鑺傜偣
    """
    # 鍒濆鍖栬窛绂诲瓧鍏革紝鎵€鏈夎妭鐐硅窛绂昏涓烘棤绌峰ぇ
    distances = {node: float('inf') for node in graph}
    distances[start] = 0

    # 浼樺厛闃熷垪锛屽瓨鍌?璺濈, 鑺傜偣)
    priority_queue = [(0, start)]

    # 璁板綍鍓嶉┍鑺傜偣锛岀敤浜庨噸寤鸿矾寰?
    previous_nodes = {node: None for node in graph}

    while priority_queue:
        current_distance, current_node = heapq.heappop(priority_queue)

        # 濡傛灉褰撳墠璺濈澶т簬宸茶褰曠殑璺濈锛岃烦杩?
        if current_distance > distances[current_node]:
            continue

        # 閬嶅巻閭诲眳鑺傜偣
        for neighbor, weight in graph.get(current_node, []):
            distance = current_distance + weight

            # 濡傛灉鎵惧埌鏇寸煭鐨勮矾寰?
            if distance < distances[neighbor]:
                distances[neighbor] = distance
                previous_nodes[neighbor] = current_node
                heapq.heappush(priority_queue, (distance, neighbor))

    return distances, previous_nodes

def get_shortest_path(previous_nodes, start, target):
    """鏍规嵁鍓嶉┍鑺傜偣閲嶅缓鏈€鐭矾寰?""
    path = []
    current = target

    while current is not None:
        path.append(current)
        current = previous_nodes[current]

    path.reverse()

    if path[0] == start:
        return path
    else:
        return []  # 娌℃湁璺緞

# 浣跨敤绀轰緥
if __name__ == "__main__":
    # 鍒涘缓绀轰緥鍥?
    graph = {
        'A': [('B', 1), ('C', 4)],
        'B': [('C', 2), ('D', 5)],
        'C': [('D', 1)],
        'D': []
    }

    start_node = 'A'
    distances, previous_nodes = dijkstra(graph, start_node)

    print(f"浠庤妭鐐?{start_node} 鍒板悇鑺傜偣鐨勬渶鐭窛绂?")
    for node, dist in distances.items():
        print(f"  {node}: {dist}")

    # 鑾峰彇鍒扮壒瀹氳妭鐐圭殑璺緞
    target = 'D'
    path = get_shortest_path(previous_nodes, start_node, target)
    print(f"\n浠?{start_node} 鍒?{target} 鐨勬渶鐭矾寰? {' -> '.join(path)}")

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-04-08 02:07:18Z)**_

日志里没有 `knowledge_document` 相关的报错，说明问题是**表还没建**。后端启动时 `@PostConstruct` 查询该表失败，但被 `try-catch` 吞掉了，前端请求 `/api/documents` 时直接报 500。

在数据库里手动执行这条建表语句就好了：

```sql
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `knowledge_document` (
    `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    `title` VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
    `content` MEDIUMTEXT NOT NULL,
    `category` VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL,
    `embedding` JSON DEFAULT NULL,
    `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    INDEX `idx_doc_category` (`category`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
```

用你的 MySQL 客户端（Navicat、DBeaver 或命令行）连接 `coding_assistant` 数据库执行一下，然后重启后端即可。
